info.description: Fortrea Holdings, Inc. engages in the provision of clinical development and commercialization services. It operates under the Clinical Services and Enabling Services Segments. The Clinical Services segment provides services across the clinical pharmacology, clinical development, and other clinical service spectrum utilizing enabling services and technology through multiple delivery models. The Enabling Services segment provides technology solutions directly to customers that streamline complex randomization and optimize the trial drug supply process, while minimizing operational costs and supporting timely and accurate patient dosing. The company was founded on January 31, 2023 and is headquartered in Durham, NC.
info.description_zh: Fortrea Holdings, Inc. 從事提供臨床開發和商業化服務。它在臨床服務和支援服務部門下運作。臨床服務部門透過多種交付模式利用支援服務和技術提供跨臨床藥理學、臨床開發和其他臨床服務範圍的服務。賦能服務部門直接向客戶提供技術解決方案，簡化複雜的隨機化並優化試驗藥物供應流程，同時最大限度地降低營運成本並支援及時、準確的患者給藥。該公司成立於2023年1月31日，總部位於北卡羅來納州達勒姆。

info.description: GraniteShares 2x Long NBIS Daily ETF seeks daily investment results, before fees and expenses, of 2 times (200%) the daily percentage change of the ADR of Nebius Group NV (Nasdaq: NBIS). The fund is an actively managed exchange traded fund that attempts to replicate 2 times (200%) daily percentage change of the Underlying Stock by entering into financial instruments such as swaps and options on the Underlying Stock as well as directly purchasing the Underlying Stock. The fund will aim to primarily obtain its notional exposure against the Underlying Stock through swap agreements.
info.description_zh: GraniteShares 2x 多頭 NBIS 每日 ETF 尋求每日投資結果（扣除費用和開支）為 Nebius Group NV（納斯達克股票代碼：NBIS）ADR 每日百分比變化的 2 倍（200%）。該基金是一檔主動管理的交易所交易基金，試圖透過基礎股票的掉期和選擇權等金融工具以及直接購買基礎股票來複製基礎股票每日百分比變化的兩倍（200%）。該基金的目標主要是透過掉期協議獲得其標的股票的名義曝險。

info.description: Leverage Shares 2X Long NBIS Daily ETF seeks daily levered investment results, before fees and expenses, of two times (200%) of the daily percentage change in the price of the ADSs of NBIS. The fund invests at least 80% of its net assets (plus borrowings for investment purposes) in the underlying security and financial instruments with economic characteristics that, in combination, provide 200% daily leveraged exposure to the price of NBIS, consistent with the fund's investment objective. It is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: 槓桿股票 2 倍多頭 NBIS 每日 ETF 尋求每日槓桿投資結果（扣除費用和開支）為 NBIS ADS 價格每日百分比變化的兩倍 (200%)。該基金將至少 80% 的淨資產（加上用於投資目的的借款）投資於具有經濟特徵的標的證券和金融工具，這些證券和金融工具結合起來提供 NBIS 價格的 200% 每日槓桿敞口，這與基金的投資目標一致。它是非多元化的。

info.description: GitLab, Inc. engages in the intelligent development, security, and operations (DevSecOps) platform for software innovation. It enables organizations to increase developer productivity, improve operational efficiency, reduce security and compliance risk, and accelerate digital transformation. The company was founded by Dmitriy Zaporozhets and Sid Sijbrandij in 2011 and is headquartered in San Francisco, CA.
info.description_zh: GitLab, Inc. 致力於軟體創新的智慧開發、安全和營運 (DevSecOps) 平台。它使組織能夠提高開發人員生產力、提高營運效率、降低安全性和合規性風險並加速數位轉型。該公司由 Dmitriy Zaporozhets 和 Sid Sijbrandij 於 2011 年創立，總部位於加州舊金山。

info.description: Canadian Solar, Inc. engages in the manufacture of solar photovoltaic modules, provision of solar energy and battery storage solutions, and development of utility-scale solar and battery storage products. It operates through the CSI Solar and Global Energy segments. The CSI Solar segment designs, develops, and manufactures solar ingots, wafers, cells, modules, and other solar power and battery storage products. The Global Energy segment includes solar and battery storage project development and sale, asset management services for operational projects, sale of electricity, and investment in retained assets. The company was founded by Shawn Qu in October 2001 and is headquartered in Kitchener, Canada.
info.description_zh: 阿特斯陽光電力有限公司從事太陽能光伏組件製造、提供太陽能和電池儲存解決方案以及開發公用事業規模太陽能和電池儲存產品。它透過 CSI Solar 和 Global Energy 部門運作。 CSI Solar部門設計、開發和製造太陽能錠、矽片、電池、模組以及其他太陽能和電池儲存產品。全球能源部門包括太陽能和電池儲存項目的開發和銷售、營運項目的資產管理服務、電力銷售以及保留資產的投資。該公司由Shawn Qu於2001年10月創立，總部位於加拿大基奇納。

info.description: monday.com Ltd. engages in the business of operating a cloud-based visual work operating system that consists of modular building blocks that can be easily used and assembled to create software applications and work management tools and serves as a connective layer to integrate with various digital tools across an organization. It operates through the following geographical segments: United States, EMEA, United Kingdom, and Rest of the World. The company was founded by Roy Mann, Eran Kampf, and Eran Zinman in 2012 and is headquartered in Tel Aviv, Israel.
info.description_zh: monday.com Ltd. 從事經營基於雲端的視覺工作作業系統的業務，該作業系統由模組化構建塊組成，可輕鬆使用和組裝以創建軟體應用程式和工作管理工具，並作為連接層與組織內的各種數位工具整合。它透過以下地理區域開展業務：美國、歐洲、中東和非洲、英國和世界其他地區。該公司由 Roy Mann、Eran Kampf 和 Eran Zinman 於 2012 年創立，總部位於以色列特拉維夫。

info.description: Establishment Labs Holdings, Inc. engages in the manufacturing and marketing of medical devices for aesthetic and reconstructive plastic surgery. Its brands include Motiva Implants, SilkSurface, SmoothSilk, VelvetSurface, ProgressiveGel, TrueMonobloc, BluSeal, Divina, Ergonomix, Ergomonix2, Ergonomix2 Diamond, Mia Femtech, MotivaImagine, GEM, Zen, Preserve, etc. The company was founded by Juan Jose Chacon-Quiros in 2004 and is headquartered in Austin, TX.
info.description_zh: Installation Labs Holdings, Inc. 從事美容和重建整形手術醫療設備的製造和行銷。旗下品牌包括Motiva Implants、SilkSurface、SmoothSilk、VelvetSurface、ProgressiveGel、TrueMonobloc、BluSeal、Divina、Ergonomix、Ergomonix2、Ergonomix2 Diamond、Mia Femtech、MotIm、Ergomonix2、Ergonomix2 Diamond、Mia Femtech、MotImagine、GEM、Zen、Pmagine、ZotIen、Pmagine。該公司由Juan Jose Chacon-Quiros於2004年創立，總部位於德克薩斯州奧斯汀。

info.description: Rapid7, Inc. engages in the provision of cyber security analytics and automation services. Its products include Metasploit, Nexpose, AppSpider, tCell by Rapid7, as well as insight platforms such as InsightDR, InsightIVM, InsightAppSec, InsightConnect, and InsightOps. The firm also offers security and product consulting services. The company was founded by Alan P. Matthews, Tas Giakouminakis, and Chad Loder in July 2000 and is headquartered in Boston, MA.
info.description_zh: Rapid7, Inc. 從事提供網路安全分析和自動化服務。其產品包括Metasploit、Nexpose、AppSpider、Rapid7的tCell，以及InsightDR、InsightIVM、InsightAppSec、InsightConnect和InsightOps等洞察平台。該公司還提供安全和產品諮詢服務。該公司由 Alan P. Matthews、Tas Giakouminakis 和 Chad Loder 於 2000 年 7 月創立，總部位於馬薩諸塞州波士頓。

info.description: Bruker Corp. engages in the business of developing, manufacturing, and distributing high-performance scientific instruments and analytical and diagnostic solutions that enable customers to explore life and materials at microscopic, molecular, and cellular levels. It operates through the following segments: Bruker Scientific Instruments (BSI) BioSpin, BSI Chemicals, Applied Markets, Life Science, In-Vitro Diagnostics, Detection (CALID), BSI Nano, and Bruker Energy and Supercon Technologies (BEST). The BSI BioSpin segment includes life science tools based on magnetic resonance technology. The BSI CALID segment focuses on life science mass spectrometry and ion mobility spectrometry solutions, analytical and process analysis instruments, and solutions based on infrared and Raman molecular spectroscopy technologies and radiological and nuclear detectors for chemical, biological, radiological, nuclear, and explosive detection. The BSI Nano segment offers advanced x-ray instruments, atomic force microscopy instrumentation, advanced fluorescence optical microscopy instruments, analytical tools for electron microscopes and x-ray metrology, defect-detection equipment for semiconductor process control, handheld, portable, and mobile x-ray fluorescence spectrometry instruments, spark optical emission spectroscopy systems, and chip cytometry products and services for targeted spatial proteomics, multi-omics services, and products and services for spatial genomics research. The BEST segment is involved in superconducting and non-superconducting materials and devices for use in renewable energy, energy infrastructure, healthcare, and big science research. The company was founded by Emil Bruker and Gunther Laukien in 1960 and is headquartered in Billerica, MA.
info.description_zh: 布魯克公司從事開發、製造和分銷高性能科學儀器以及分析和診斷解決方案的業務，使客戶能夠在微觀、分子和細胞層面上探索生命和材料。該公司透過以下部門運作：布魯克科學儀器 (BSI) BioSpin、BSI Chemicals、應用市場、生命科學、體外診斷、檢測 (CALID)、BSI Nano 以及布魯克能源和 Supercon 技術 (BEST)。 BSI BioSpin 部門包括基於磁振造影技術的生命科學工具。 BSI CALID 部門專注於生命科學質譜和離子遷移譜解決方案、分析和製程分析儀器，以及基於紅外線和拉曼分子光譜技術以及用於化學、生物、放射性、核子和爆炸物檢測的放射和核探測器的解決方案。 BSI Nano 部門提供先進的 X 射線儀器、原子力顯微鏡儀器、先進的螢光光學顯微鏡儀器、電子顯微鏡和 X 射線計量分析工具、用於半導體過程控制的缺陷檢測設備、手持式、便攜式和移動式 X 射線螢光光譜儀器、火花光學發射光譜系統以及用於目標空間蛋白質組學、多組學服務以及空間基因組學研究的產品和細胞服務的產品基因組學。 BEST 部門涉及用於再​​生能源、能源基礎設施、醫療保健和大科學研究的超導和非超導材料和設備。該公司由 Emil Bruker 和 Gunther Laukien 於 1960 年創立，總部位於馬薩諸塞州比爾里卡。

info.description: Anteris Technologies Global Corp. is a structural heart company, which engages in the development and commercialization of medical devices for heart diseases. It operates through the following geographical segments: United States, Germany, Australia, Switzerland, and Sweden. The company was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Eagan, MN.
info.description_zh: Anteris Technologies Global Corp.是一家結構心臟公司，從事心臟病醫療設備的開發和商業化。它透過以下地理區域運作：美國、德國、澳洲、瑞士和瑞典。該公司成立於 1999 年，總部位於明尼蘇達州伊根。

info.description: REGENXBIO, Inc. is a clinical-stage biotechnology company, which engages in the development, commercialization, and licensing of recombinant adeno-associated virus gene therapy. Its product candidates include the NAV Technology Platform, which consists of exclusive rights to novel adeno-associated viral vectors, and therapeutic programs such as RGX-314, RGX-202, RGX-121, RGX-111, RGX-181, and RGX-381. The company was founded by Kenneth T. Mills and James M. Wilson on July 16, 2008 and is headquartered in Rockville, MD.
info.description_zh: REGENXBIO, Inc.是一家臨床階段生物技術公司，從事重組腺相關病毒基因療法的開發、商業化和許可。其候選產品包括 NAV 技術平台，該平台擁有新型腺相關病毒載體的獨家權利，以及 RGX-314、RGX-202、RGX-121、RGX-111、RGX-181 和 RGX-381 等治療項目。該公司由 Kenneth T. Mills 和 James M. Wilson 於 2008 年 7 月 16 日創立，總部位於馬裡蘭州羅克維爾。

info.description: Neurocrine Biosciences, Inc. is a neuroscience-focused, biopharmaceutical company, which engages in the research and development, commercialization, and sale of pharmaceuticals for the treatment of neurological, neuroendocrine, and neuropsychiatric disorders. Its portfolio of products includes treatments for tardive dyskinesia, chorea associated with Huntington's disease, classic congenital adrenal hyperplasia (CAH), and endometriosis and uterine fibroids. The company was founded by Kevin C. Gorman and Wylie W. Vale in January 1992 and is headquartered in San Diego, CA.
info.industry_zh: 藥品製造商 - 特用藥品和非專利藥品
info.description_zh: Neurocrine Biosciences, Inc.是一家專注於神經科學的生物製藥公司，從事治療神經系統、神經內分泌和神經精神疾病的藥物的研發、商業化和銷售。其產品組合包括遲發性運動障礙、亨丁頓舞蹈症相關舞蹈症、經典先天性腎上腺增生症 (CAH) 以及子宮內膜異位症和子宮肌瘤的治療。該公司由 Kevin C. Gorman 和 Wylie W. Vale 於 1992 年 1 月創立，總部位於加利福尼亞州聖地亞哥。

info.description: Hallador Energy Co. engages in business through its subsidiary, Sunrise Coal, LLC, which produces coal in the Illinois Basin for the electric power generation industry. It also owns summit terminal, a transport facility on the Ohio River. The company was founded in 1951 and is headquartered in Terre Haute, IN.
info.description_zh: Hallador Energy Co. 透過其子公司 Sunrise Coal, LLC 從事業務，該公司在伊利諾伊州盆地生產用於發電行業的煤炭。它還擁有山頂碼頭，這是俄亥俄河上的一個交通設施。該公司成立於 1951 年，總部位於印第安納州特雷霍特。

info.description: IQVIA Holdings, Inc. engages in the provision of analytics, technology solutions, and clinical research services to the life sciences industry. It operates through the following segments: Technology and Analytics Solutions, Research and Development Solutions, and Contract Sales and Medical Solutions. The Technology and Analytics Solutions segment supplies mission critical information, technology solutions, and real-world solutions and services to the firm's life science clients. The Research and Development Solutions segment provides outsourced clinical research and clinical trial related services. The Contract Sales and Medical Solutions segment offers health care provider and patient engagement services to both biopharmaceutical customers and the healthcare market. The company was founded by Dennis B. Gillings and Gary Koch in 1982 and is headquartered in Durham, NC.
info.description_zh: IQVIA Holdings, Inc. 致力於為生命科學產業提供分析、技術解決方案和臨床研究服務。它透過以下部門運作：技術和分析解決方案、研究和開發解決方案以及合約銷售和醫療解決方案。技術和分析解決方案部門為公司的生命科學客戶提供關鍵任務資訊、技術解決方案以及實際解決方案和服務。研究和開發解決方案部門提供外包臨床研究和臨床試驗相關服務。合約銷售和醫療解決方案部門為生物製藥客戶和醫療保健市場提供醫療保健提供者和患者參與服務。該公司由 Dennis B. Gillings 和 Gary Koch 於 1982 年創立，總部位於北卡羅來納州達勒姆。

info.description: BRC Group Holdings, Inc. engages in the provision of financial services and solutions to the capital raising and financial advisory needs of public and private firms. It operates through the following segments: Capital Markets, Wealth Management, Lingo, magicJack, Marconi Wireless, United Online (UOL), and Consumer Products. The Capital Markets segment provides investment banking, corporate finance, research, wealth management, and sales and trading services to corporate, institutional, and high net worth clients. The Wealth Management segment offers retail brokerage, investment management, and insurance, and tax preparation services. The Lingo segment offers a global cloud or unified communications and managed service provider to Enterprise and Small to Medium Businesses in the United States. The magicJack VoIP segment is a non-interconnected Voice-over-IP (VoIP) cloud-based communications service provider that offers related devices and subscription services within the United States and Canada. The Marcon segment is a mobile virtual network operator that provides mobile phone voice, text, and data services and devices using the Credo Mobile brand. The United Online segment is an Internet access provider that offers dial-up and digital subscriber line services under the NetZero and Juno brands across the United States. The Consumer Products segment generates revenue through sales of laptop and computer accessories. The company was founded in 1973 and is headquartered in Los Angeles, CA.
info.description_zh: BRC Group Holdings, Inc. 致力於提供金融服務和解決方案，以滿足上市和私人公司的融資和財務諮詢需求。該公司透過以下部門營運：資本市場、財富管理、Lingo、magicJack、Marconi Wireless、United Online (UOL) 和消費品部門。資本市場部門為企業、機構和高淨值客戶提供投資銀行、企業融資、研究、財富管理以及銷售和交易服務。財富管理部門提供零售經紀、投資管理、保險和稅務準備服務。 Lingo 部門為美國的企業和中小型企業提供全球雲端或統一通訊和託管服務供應商。 magicJack VoIP 部門是一家非互連 IP 語音 (VoIP) 雲端通訊服務供應商，在美國和加拿大提供相關設備和訂閱服務。 Marcon 部門是一家行動虛擬網路營運商，使用 Credo Mobile 品牌提供手機語音、文字和數據服務及設備。 United Online 部門是一家網路存取供應商，以 NetZero 和 Juno 品牌在美國各地提供撥接和數位用戶線路服務。消費品部門透過銷售筆記型電腦和電腦配件產生收入。該公司成立於 1973 年，總部位於加州洛杉磯。

info.description: Healthpeak Properties, Inc. is a Standard & Poor's 500 company, which engages in acquiring, developing, owning, leasing, and managing healthcare real estate across the United States. It operates through the following segments: Lab, Outpatient Medical, Continuing Care Retirement Community (CCRC), and Other Non-Reportable. The Lab segment refers to lab properties, which contain laboratory and office space. The Outpatient Medical segment includes outpatient medical buildings and hospitals. The CCRC segment deals with retirement communities that include independent living, assisted living, memory care, and skilled nursing units. The Other Non-Reportable segment consists of an unconsolidated joint venture with a sovereign wealth fund that owns 19 senior housing assets and loans receivable. The company was founded in 1985 and is headquartered in Denver, CO.
info.industry_zh: 房地產投資信託基金 - 醫療保健設施
info.description_zh: Healthpeak Properties, Inc. 是一家標準普爾 500 強公司，在美國各地從事收購、開發、擁有、租賃和管理醫療保健房地產。它透過以下部門運作：實驗室、門診醫療、持續照護退休社區 (CCRC) 和其他非報告部門。實驗室部分是指實驗室財產，其中包含實驗室和辦公空間。門診醫療部門包括門診醫療大樓和醫院。 CCRC 部門涉及退休社區，包括獨立生活、輔助生活、記憶護理和熟練護理單位。其他非報告部門由與主權財富基金成立的未合併合資企業組成，該基金擁有 19 項高級住房資產和應收貸款。該公司成立於 1985 年，總部位於科羅拉多州丹佛市。

info.description: The Walt Disney Co. engages in the business of international family entertainment and media enterprise. It owns and operates television and radio production, distribution and broadcasting stations, direct-to-consumer services, amusement parks, and hotels. It operates through the following business segments: Disney Entertainment, ESPN, and Disney Parks, Experiences, and Products. The company was founded by Walter Elias Disney on October 16, 1923 and is headquartered in Burbank, CA.
info.description_zh: 華特迪士尼公司從事國際家庭娛樂和媒體業務。它擁有並經營電視和廣播製作、發行和廣播電台、直接面向消費者的服務、遊樂園和酒店。它透過以下業務部門運作：迪士尼娛樂、ESPN 以及迪士尼樂園、體驗和產品。該公司由沃爾特·埃利亞斯·迪士尼 (Walter Elias Disney) 於 1923 年 10 月 16 日創立，總部位於加利福尼亞州伯班克。

info.description: Defiance Daily Target 2X Long ORCL ETF seeks daily investment results, before fees and expenses, of two times (200%) the daily percentage change in the share price of Oracle Corporation (NYSE: ORCL). The fund is an actively managed exchange traded fund ("ETF") that attempts to achieve two times (200%) the daily percentage change in the share price of the underlying security by employing derivatives, namely swap agreements and/or listed options contracts. The fund is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: Defiance Daily Target 2X Long ORCL ETF 尋求甲骨文公司（NYSE：ORCL）每日股價變動百分比兩倍（200%）的每日投資結果（扣除費用和開支）。該基金是一種主動管理的交易所交易基金（「ETF」），試圖透過使用衍生性商品（即掉期協議和/或上市選擇權合約）來實現標的證券股價每日百分比變化的兩倍（200%）。該基金是非多元化的。

info.description: Direxion Daily ORCL Bull 2X ETF seeks daily investment results, before fees and expenses, of 200% of the daily performance of ORCL. The fund, under normal circumstances, invests at least 80% of its net assets (plus any borrowings for investment purposes) in the securities of ORCL and financial instruments, such as swap agreements and options, that, in combination, provide 2X daily leveraged exposure to ORCL, consistent with the fund's investment objective. The fund is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: Direxion Daily ORCL Bull 2X ETF 尋求每日投資結果（未計費用和開支）為 ORCL 每日業績的 200%。在正常情況下，該基金將至少 80% 的淨資產（加上任何用於投資目的的借款）投資於 ORCL 的證券以及掉期協議和期權等金融工具，這些組合起來為 ORCL 提供 2 倍的每日槓桿敞口，這與基金的投資目標一致。該基金是非多元化的。

info.description: Oracle Corp. engages in the provision of products and services that address aspects of corporate information technology environments, including applications and infrastructure technologies. It operates through the following business segments: Cloud and License, Hardware, and Services. The Cloud and License segment markets, sells, and delivers enterprise applications and infrastructure technologies through cloud and on-premise deployment models including cloud services and license support offerings. The Hardware segment provides infrastructure technologies including Oracle Engineered Systems, servers, storage, industry-specific hardware, operating systems, virtualization, management, and other hardware-related software. The Services segment offers consulting, advanced support, and education services. The company was founded by Lawrence Joseph Ellison, Robert Nimrod Miner, and Edward A. Oates on June 16, 1977 and is headquartered in Austin, TX.
info.description_zh: Oracle Corp. 提供解決企業資訊科技環境各方面問題的產品和服務，包括應用程式和基礎架構技術。它透過以下業務部門運作：雲端和授權、硬體和服務。雲端和許可證部門透過雲端和本地部署模型（包括雲端服務和許可證支援產品）行銷、銷售和交付企業應用程式和基礎設施技術。硬體部門提供基礎設施技術，包括 Oracle 工程系統、伺服器、儲存、行業特定硬體、作業系統、虛擬化、管理和其他硬體相關軟體。服務部門提供諮詢、高階支援和教育服務。該公司由 Lawrence Joseph Ellison、Robert Nimrod Miner 和 Edward A. Oates 於 1977 年 6 月 16 日創立，總部位於德克薩斯州奧斯汀。

info.description: Zscaler, Inc. engages in the provision of a cloud-based internet security platform. It offers Zero Trust Exchange, Zscaler Client Connector, Zscaler Internet Access, Zscaler Private Access, Zscaler B2B, Zscaler Cloud Protection, and Zscaler Digital Experience. The company was founded by Jagtar Singh Chaudhry and K. Kailash in September 2007 and is headquartered in San Jose, CA.
info.description_zh: Zscaler, Inc. 致力於提供基於雲端的網路安全平台。它提供零信任交換、Zscaler 客戶端連接器、Zscaler Internet 存取、Zscaler 私人存取、Zscaler B2B、Zscaler 雲端保護和 Zscaler 數位體驗。該公司由 Jagtar Singh Chaudhry 和 K. Kailash 於 2007 年 9 月創立，總部位於加州聖荷西。

info.description: Leverage Shares 2X Long GLW Daily ETF is an actively managed exchange-traded fund that seeks to provide 200% of the daily investment results of the common stock of Corning Incorporated. The strategy utilizes financial derivatives to magnify the daily price movements of the underlying security, requiring active monitoring due to the effects of daily rebalancing and compounding on long-term returns.
info.description_zh: 槓桿股票 2 倍多頭 GLW 每日 ETF 是一款主動管理的交易所交易基金，旨在提供康寧公司普通股 200% 的每日投資結果。該策略利用金融衍生性商品來放大基礎證券的每日價格變動，由於每日重新平衡和複利對長期回報的影響，需要積極監控。

info.description: The Middleby Corp. engages in the design, manufacture, marketing, and distribution of foodservice equipment. It operates through the following segments: Commercial Foodservice Equipment Group, Food Processing Equipment Group, Residential Kitchen Equipment Group, and Corporate and Other. The Commercial Foodservice Equipment Group segment manufactures, sells, and distributes foodservice equipment for the restaurant and institutional kitchen industry. The Food Processing Equipment Group segment manufactures preparation, cooking, packaging, food handling, and food safety equipment for the food processing industry. The Residential Kitchen Equipment Group segment manufactures, sells, and distributes kitchen equipment such as cookers, stoves, ovens, refrigerators, dishwashers, microwaves, cooktops, wine coolers, ice machines, ventilation, and outdoor equipment for the residential market. The Corporate and Other segment refers to the corporate and other general company assets and operations. The company was founded in 1888 and is headquartered in Elgin, IL.
info.description_zh: Middleby Corp. 從事餐飲服務設備的設計、製造、行銷和分銷。該公司透過以下部門運作：商業餐飲服務設備部門、食品加工設備部門、住宅廚房設備部門以及企業及其他部門。商業餐飲服務設備集團部門為餐廳和機構廚房產業製造、銷售和分銷餐飲服務設備。食品加工設備集團部門為食品加工產業製造準備、烹飪、包裝、食品處理和食品安全設備。住宅廚房設備集團部門為住宅市場製造、銷售和分銷炊具、爐灶、烤箱、冰箱、洗碗機、微波爐、爐灶、酒櫃、製冰機、通風設備和戶外設備等廚房設備。公司和其他部門是指公司和其他一般公司資產和業務。該公司成立於 1888 年，總部位於伊利諾伊州埃爾金。

info.description: Open Text Corp. engages in the design, development, marketing and sales of enterprise information management software and solutions. It includes customer experience management (CEM), digital process automation, business network, and enterprise content management, discovery, security, and artificial intelligence (AI) and analytics solutions. It also offers consulting, managed, and learning services. The company was founded on June 26, 1991 and is headquartered in Waterloo, Canada.
info.description_zh: Open Text Corp. 從事企業資訊管理軟體和解決方案的設計、開發、行銷和銷售。它包括客戶體驗管理 (CEM)、數位流程自動化、業務網路以及企業內容管理、發現、安全性以及人工智慧 (AI) 和分析解決方案。它還提供諮詢、管理和學習服務。該公司成立於1991年6月26日，總部位於加拿大滑鐵盧。

info.description: Qualys, Inc. engages in the provision of cloud security and compliance solutions. Its products enable organizations to identify security risks to information technology infrastructures, help protect information technology systems and applications from cyber attacks, and achieve compliance with internal policies and external regulations. The firm also offers solutions through a software-as-a-service model, primarily with renewable annual subscriptions. The company was founded on December 30, 1999 and is headquartered in Foster City, CA.
info.description_zh: Qualys, Inc. 致力於提供雲端安全性和合規性解決方案。其產品使組織能夠識別資訊技術基礎設施的安全風險，幫助保護資訊科技系統和應用程式免受網路攻擊，並實現內部政策和外部法規的合規性。該公司還透過軟體即服務模式提供解決方案，主要採用可更新的年度訂閱。該公司成立於1999年12月30日，總部位於加州福斯特城。

info.description: Warner Music Group Corp. engages in the publishing and recording of music. It operates through the Recorded Music and Music Publishing segments. The Recorded Music segment is involved in the sale, marketing, distribution, and licensing of recorded music produced by the company's recording artists. The Music Publishing segment acts as a copyright owner and/or administrator of the musical compositions and generates revenues related to the exploitation of musical compositions. The company was founded on November 21, 2003 and is headquartered in New York, NY.
info.description_zh: 華納音樂集團公司從事音樂出版和錄製。它透過錄製音樂和音樂出版部門運作。錄製音樂部門涉及公司唱片藝術家製作的錄製音樂的銷售、行銷、分銷和授權。音樂出版部門充當音樂作品的版權所有者和/或管理員，並產生與音樂作品的利用相關的收入。該公司成立於2003年11月21日，總部位於紐約州紐約市。

info.description: Revvity, Inc. provides health science solutions, technologies, expertise, and services that deliver complete workflows from discovery to development, and diagnosis to cure. It focuses on translational multi-omics technologies, biomarker identification, imaging, prediction, screening, detection and diagnosis, and informatics. The firm operates through the following segments: Life Sciences and Diagnostics. The Life Sciences segment delivers innovative solutions to optimize workflows, boost productivity, and accelerate drug discovery and development. The Diagnostics segment provides instruments, reagents, assay platforms, and software to healthcare and research professionals, with a focus on reproductive health, immunodiagnostics, emerging market diagnostics, and applied genomics to enhance patient outcomes. Revvity was founded on April 19, 1937 and is headquartered in Waltham, MA.
info.description_zh: Revvity, Inc. 提供健康科學解決方案、技術、專業知識和服務，提供從發現到開發、從診斷到治癒的完整工作流程。它專注於轉化多組學技術、生物標記識別、成像、預測、篩選、檢測和診斷以及資訊學。該公司透過以下部門運作：生命科學和診斷。生命科學部門提供創新的解決方案來優化工作流程、提高生產力並加速藥物發現和開發。診斷部門為醫療保健和研究專業人員提供儀器、試劑、分析平台和軟體，重點在於生殖健康、免疫診斷、新興市場診斷和應用基因組學，以提高患者的治療效果。 Revvity 成立於 1937 年 4 月 19 日，總部位於馬薩諸塞州沃爾瑟姆。

info.description: Mitek Systems, Inc. engages in the development of mobile capture and digital identity verification solutions. The company was founded in 1986 and is headquartered in San Diego, CA.
info.description_zh: Mitek Systems, Inc. 從事行動擷取和數位身分驗證解決方案的開發。該公司成立於 1986 年，總部位於加利福尼亞州聖地亞哥。

info.description: Wix.com Ltd. engages in providing a web development platform for creators, delivering its solutions through a Software-as-a-Service model. Its products include website templates, website builder, website design, Wix features, app market, web hosting, domain names, website accessibility, mobile app builder, and AI website builder. The company was founded by Avishai Abrahami, Nadav Abrahami, Nir Zohar, and Giora Kaplan on October 5, 2006 and is headquartered in Tel Aviv, Israel.
info.description_zh: Wix.com Ltd. 致力於為創作者提供網頁開發平台，透過軟體即服務模式提供其解決方案。其產品包括網站模板、網站建立器、網站設計、Wix 功能、應用程式市場、網站託管、網域、網站可訪問性、行動應用程式建立器和人工智慧網站建立器。該公司由 Avishai Abrahami、Nadav Abrahami、Nir Zohar 和 Giora Kaplan 於 2006 年 10 月 5 日創立，總部位於以色列特拉維夫。

info.description: NetEase, Inc. is an internet technology company, which engages in the provision of premium online services centered around content, community, communication and commerce. It develops and operates some of the most popular PC-client and mobile games in China. The firm also operates some of the most popular international online games in China by partnering with Blizzard Entertainment, Mojang AB (a Microsoft subsidiary) and other global game developers. NetEase also offers other services, including the intelligent learning services of its majority-controlled subsidiary, Youdao, its music streaming platform, NetEase Cloud Music, and its private label e-commerce platform, Yanxuan. The company operates through the following business segments: Online Game Services, Youdao, Cloud Music, and Innovative Businesses and Others. The Online Game Services segment produces online PC-client games. The Youdao segment is an online education service provider in China. The Cloud Music segment represents revenue from online music services through the sales of membership subscriptions in various content and service packages. The Innovative Businesses and Others segment offers other services, which includes live video streaming and its private label e-commerce platform, Yanxuan. The company was founded by Lei Ding in June 1997 and is headquartered in Beijing, China.
info.description_zh: 網易公司是一家網路科技公司，提供以內容、社群、通訊和商業為核心的優質線上服務。它開發並經營一些中國最受歡迎的電腦客戶端和手機遊戲。該公司還與暴雪娛樂、Mojang AB（微軟子公司）和其他全球遊戲開發商合作，在中國經營一些最受歡迎的國際網路遊戲。網易也提供其他服務，包括其控股子公司有道的智慧學習服務、音樂串流平台網易雲音樂以及自有品牌電子商務平台嚴選。該公司透過以下業務板塊運作：網路遊戲服務、有道、雲端音樂、創新業務及其他。線上遊戲服務部門生產線上電腦用戶端遊戲。有道部門是中國的線上教育服務提供者。雲端音樂部門透過銷售各種內容和服務包的會員訂閱來獲得線上音樂服務的收入。創新業務及其他部門提供其他服務，其中包括視訊直播及其自有品牌電子商務平台嚴選。該公司由丁磊於1997年6月創立，總部位於中國北京。

info.description: Rhythm Pharmaceuticals, Inc. is a commercial-stage biopharmaceutical company, which engages in the development and commercialization of therapeutics for patients with rare diseases. The firm offers IMCIVREE (setmelanotide), a precision medicine designed to treat hyperphagia and severe obesity caused by rare melanocortin-4 receptor (MC4R) diseases. It is also involved in the clinical development program for setmelanotide in other rare MC4R pathway diseases, as well as a preclinical suite of investigational candidates for the treatment of congenital hyperinsulinism. The company was founded by Bart Henderson in November 2008 and is headquartered in Boston, MA.
info.description_zh: Rhythm Pharmaceuticals, Inc. 是一家商業階段的生物製藥公司，致力於罕見疾病患者治療藥物的開發和商業化。該公司提供 IMCIVREE（setmelanotide），這是一種精準藥物，旨在治療由罕見的黑皮質素 4 受體（MC4R）疾病引起的食慾過盛和嚴重肥胖。它還參與了 setmelanotide 在其他罕見 MC4R 通路疾病中的臨床開發計劃，以及用於治療先天性高胰島素血症的臨床前研究候選藥物套件。該公司由 Bart Henderson 於 2008 年 11 月創立，總部位於馬薩諸塞州波士頓。

info.description: Expeditors International of Washington, Inc. engages in the provision of global logistics services. It operates through the following geographical segments: United States, Other North America, Latin America, North Asia, South Asia, Europe, and Middle East, Africa, and India. It offers air freight, ocean freight and ocean and customs brokerage and other services. It also provides customer solutions such as order management, time-definite transportation, warehousing and distribution, temperature-controlled transit, cargo insurance and customized logistics solutions. The company was founded by John M. Kaiser, Peter Rose, Wang Li Kou, Kevin Walsh, Hank Wong, George Ho, Robert Chiarito, and Glenn Alger in 1979 and is headquartered in Bellevue, WA.
info.description_zh: Expeditors International of Washington, Inc. 從事提供全球物流服務。該公司透過以下地理區域開展業務：美國、北美其他地區、拉丁美洲、北亞、南亞、歐洲、中東、非洲和印度。它提供空運、海運以及海運和報關等服務。它還為客戶提供訂單管理、限時運輸、倉儲配送、溫控運輸、貨物保險和客製化物流解決方案等解決方案。該公司由 John M. Kaiser、Peter Rose、Wang Li Kou、Kevin Walsh、Hank Wong、George Ho、Robert Chiarito 和 Glenn Alger 於 1979 年創立，總部位於華盛頓州貝爾維尤。

info.description: Colgate-Palmolive Co. engages in the manufacturing and distribution of consumer products. It operates through the Oral, Personal, and Home Care, and Pet Nutrition segments. The Oral, Personal, and Home Care segment includes toothpaste, toothbrushes, mouthwash, bar and liquid hand soaps, shower gels, shampoos, conditioners, deodorants and antiperspirants, skin health products, dishwashing detergents, fabric conditioners, household cleaners, and other similar items. The Pet Nutrition segment offers specialty pet nutrition products manufactured and marketed by Hill's Pet Nutrition. The company was founded by William Colgate in 1806 and is headquartered in New York, NY.
info.description_zh: 高露潔棕欖公司從事消費品的製造業及分銷。它透過口腔、個人和家庭護理以及寵物營養部門運作。口腔、個人和家庭護理部分包括牙膏、牙刷、漱口水、皂條和洗手液、沐浴露、洗髮精、護髮素、除臭劑和止汗劑、皮膚保健品、餐具洗滌劑、織物調理劑、家用清潔劑和其他類似產品。寵物營養部門提供由 Hill's Pet Nutrition 製造和銷售的特殊寵物營養產品。該公司由 William Colgate 於 1806 年創立，總部位於紐約州紐約市。

info.description: Veracyte, Inc. engages in the research, development and commercialization of diagnostic products. The firm's portfolio includes Afirma, Percepta, and Envisia. It intends to treat thyroid cancer, improve lung cancer screening, and clarify the diagnosis of idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis. The company was founded by Bonnie H. Anderson and Y. Douglas Dolginow on August 15, 2006 and is headquartered in South San Francisco, CA.
info.description_zh: Veracyte, Inc. 從事診斷產品的研究、開發和商業化。該公司的投資組合包括 Afirma、Percepta 和 Envisia。它旨在治療甲狀腺癌，改善肺癌篩檢，並明確特發性肺纖維化的診斷。該公司由 Bonnie H. Anderson 和 Y. Douglas Dolginow 於 2006 年 8 月 15 日創立，總部位於加州南舊金山。

info.description: Abivax SA engages in the sale, research, distribution, and development of biopharmaceutical products. It offers commercial and development products of anti-viral compounds and human vaccines. The commercialized products include vaccines for typhoid fever, meningococcus, and leptospirosis. The products under development include vaccines for chronic hepatitis B, ebola, and dengue virus. The company was founded by Philippe Pouletty on December 4, 2003 and is headquartered in Paris, France.
info.description_zh: Abivax SA 從事生物製藥產品的銷售、研究、分銷和開發。它提供抗病毒化合物和人類疫苗的商業和開發產品。商業化產品包括傷寒、腦膜炎球菌和鉤端螺旋體病疫苗。正在開發的產品包括慢性B型肝炎、伊波拉病毒和登革熱病毒疫苗。該公司由Philippe Pouletty於2003年12月4日創立，總部位於法國巴黎。

info.description: Plains GP Holdings LP owns and operates midstream energy infrastructure and provides logistics services primarily for crude oil, natural gas liquids and natural gas through its indirect investment in Plains All American Pipeline, L.P. The firm operates through the following segments: Transportation, Facilities and Supply and Logistics. The Transportation segment consists of fee-based activities associated with transporting crude oil and NGL on pipelines, gathering systems, trucks and barges. The Facilities segment consists of fee-based activities associated with providing storage, terminalling and throughput services primarily for crude oil, NGL and natural gas, as well as NGL fractionation and isomerization services and natural gas and condensate processing services. The Supply and Logistics segment consists of storage of inventory during contango market conditions and the seasonal storage of NGL, purchase of NGL from producers, refiners, processors and other marketers, extraction of NGL from gas processed at the facilities. The company was founded in July 2013 and is headquartered in Houston, TX.
info.description_zh: Plains GP Holdings LP 擁有並經營中游能源基礎設施，並透過其對 Plains All American Pipeline, L.P. 的間接投資，主要為原油、液化天然氣和天然氣提供物流服務。該公司透過以下部門運作：運輸、設施、供應和物流。運輸部門包括與透過管道、收集系統、卡車和駁船運輸原油和液化天然氣相關的收費活動。設施部門包括與主要為原油、液化天然氣和天然氣提供儲存、終端和吞吐量服務相關的收費活動，以及液化天然氣分餾和異構化服務以及天然氣和凝析油加工服務。供應和物流部門包括在期貨溢價市場條件下儲存庫存以及液化天然氣的季節性儲存，從生產商、煉油商、加工商和其他營銷商購買液化天然氣，從設施加工的天然氣中提取液化天然氣。該公司成立於2013年7月，總部位於德州休士頓。

info.description: Bloomin' Brands, Inc. engages in the acquisition, operation, design, and development of restaurant concepts. It operates through the U.S. and International geographical segments. The U.S. segment operates in the USA and Puerto Rico. The International segment operates in Brazil, South Korea, Hong Kong, and China. Its brands include Outback Steakhouse, Carrabba's Italian Grill, Bonefish Grill, and Fleming's Prime Steakhouse and Wine Bar. The company was founded by Chris Thomas Sullivan, Robert Danker Basham and John Timothy Gannon in March 1988 and is headquartered in Tampa, FL.
info.description_zh: Bloomin' Brands, Inc. 從事餐廳概念的收購、營運、設計和開發。它透過美國和國際地理部門開展業務。美國部門在美國和波多黎各開展業務。國際部門在巴西、韓國、香港和中國開展業務。其品牌包括 Outback Steakhouse、Carrabba's Italian Grill、Bonefish Grill 和 Fleming's Prime Steakhouse and Wine Bar。該公司由 Chris Thomas Sullivan、Robert Danker Basham 和 John Timothy Gannon 於 1988 年 3 月創立，總部位於佛羅裡達州坦帕。

info.description: First Solar, Inc. is a solar technology company, which engages in the provision of solar modules. It is involved in the design, manufacture, and sale of cadmium tellurid (CdTe) solar modules, which convert sunlight into electricity. The company was founded by Michael J. Ahearn in 1999 and is headquartered in Phoenix, AZ.
info.description_zh: First Solar, Inc.是一家太陽能技術公司，從事提供太陽能模組業務。該公司從事碲化鎘（CdTe）太陽能組件的設計、製造和銷售，該組件可將陽光轉化為電能。該公司由 Michael J. Ahearn 於 1999 年創立，總部位於亞利桑那州菲尼克斯。

info.description: Mirum Pharmaceuticals, Inc. is a biopharmaceutical company. The firm focuses on the development and commercialization of a late-stage pipeline of novel therapies for debilitating liver diseases. Its products include Maralixibat and Volixibat. The company was founded by Niall O'Donnel, Michael Grey and Christopher Peetz in May 2018 and is headquartered in Foster City, CA.
info.description_zh: Mirum Pharmaceuticals, Inc. 是一家生物製藥公司。該公司專注於治療衰弱性肝病的後期新療法的開發和商業化。其產品包括Maralixibat和Volixibat。該公司由 Niall O'Donnel、Michael Gray 和 Christopher Peetz 於 2018 年 5 月創立，總部位於加州福斯特城。

info.description: Targa Resources Corp. engages in the business of gathering, compressing, treating, processing, transporting, and purchasing and selling natural gas. It operates through the following segments: Gathering and Processing, and Logistics and Transportation, and Other. The Gathering and Processing segment includes assets used in the gathering, and purchase and sale of natural gas produced from oil and gas wells. The Logistics and Transportation segment refers to the activities and assets necessary to convert mixed natural gas liquids (NGLs) into NGL products. The Other contains the results of commodity derivative activity mark-to-market gains and losses related to derivative contracts. The company was founded on October 27, 2005 and is headquartered in Houston, TX.
info.description_zh: Targa Resources Corp. 從事天然氣採集、壓縮、處理、加工、運輸以及採購和銷售業務。它透過以下部門運作：收集和加工部門、物流和運輸部門以及其他部門。收集和加工部門包括用於收集、購買和銷售石油和天然氣井生產的天然氣的資產。物流和運輸部門是指將混合天然氣液體（NGL）轉化為 NGL 產品所需的活動和資產。其他包含與衍生性商品合約相關的商品衍生性商品活動以市價計價的損益結果。該公司成立於2005年10月27日，總部位於德州休士頓。

info.description: ARS Pharmaceuticals, Inc. is a biopharmaceutical company, which focuses on the development of a novel, potentially first-in-class product candidate, neffy, for the emergency treatment of Type I allergic reactions including anaphylaxis. Its product includes Epinephrine Nasal Spray. The company was founded by Richard Lowenthal, Robert Bell, and Sarina Tanimoto on August 5, 2015 and is headquartered in San Diego, CA.
info.description_zh: ARS Pharmaceuticals, Inc. 是一家生物製藥公司，專注於開發一種新型的、可能是一流的候選產品 neffy，用於緊急治療包括過敏反應在內的 I 型過敏反應。其產品包括腎上腺素鼻噴劑。該公司由 Richard Lowenthal、Robert Bell 和 Sarina Tanimoto 於 2015 年 8 月 5 日創立，總部位於加州聖地牙哥。

info.description: Alliant Energy Corp. engages in the provision of regulated electricity and natural gas service to natural gas customers in the Midwest through its two public utility subsidiaries. It operates through the Utility and ATC Holdings, Non-Utility, Parent, and Other segments. The Utility segment includes the operations of IPL and WPL, which primarily serve retail customers in Iowa and Wisconsin. The ATC Holdings, Non-Utility, Parent, and Other segment refers to the operations of AEF and its subsidiaries, Corporate Services, the Alliant Energy parent company, and any Alliant Energy parent company consolidating adjustments. The company was founded in 1981 and is headquartered in Madison, WI.
info.industry_zh: 公用事業 - 受監管的電力
info.description_zh: Alliant Energy Corp. 透過其兩家公用事業子公司向中西部的天然氣客戶提供受監管的電力和天然氣服務。它透過公用事業和 ATC Holdings、非公用事業、母公司和其他部門進行運作。公用事業部門包括 IPL 和 WPL 的業務，主要為愛荷華州和威斯康辛州的零售客戶提供服務。 ATC Holdings、非公用事業、母公司和其他部門是指 AEF 及其子公司、企業服務、Alliant Energy 母公司以及任何 Alliant Energy 母公司合併調整的業務。該公司成立於 1981 年，總部位於威斯康辛州麥迪遜。

info.description: Calumet, Inc. engages in the manufacturing, formulation, and sale of specialty branded products and renewable fuel. It operates through the following segments: Specialty Products and Solutions, Montana/Renewables, Performance Brands, and Corporate. The Specialty Products & Solutions segment consists of customer-focused solutions and formulation businesses. The Montana/Renewables segment is composed of a Great Falls specialty asphalt facility and Montana Renewables facility. The Performance Brands segment includes Royal Purple, Bel-Ray, and TruFuel. The Corporate segment focuses on the general and administrative expenses not allocated to other segments. The company was founded in 1919 and is headquartered in Indianapolis, IN.
info.description_zh: Calumet, Inc. 從事專業品牌產品和再生燃料的製造、配​​製和銷售。該公司透過以下部門運作：特種產品和解決方案部門、蒙大拿州/再生能源部門、績效品牌部門和企業部門。特種產品和解決方案部門包括以客戶為中心的解決方案和配方業務。蒙大拿州/再生能源部門由大瀑布特種瀝青設施和蒙大拿州再生能源設施組成。性能品牌部門包括 Royal Purple、Bel-Ray 和 TruFuel。公司部門專注於未分配給其他部門的一般和管理費用。該公司成立於 1919 年，總部位於印第安納州印第安納波利斯。

info.description: Mercury Systems, Inc. is a technology company, which engages in the delivery of processing technology for aerospace and defense missions. Its processing technologies include signal solutions, display, software applications, networking, storage, and secure processing. It operates through the following geographical segments: US, Asia Pacific, and Europe. The company was founded on July 14, 1981 and is headquartered in Andover, MA.
info.description_zh: Mercury Systems, Inc. 是一家科技公司，致力於為航空航太和國防任務提供處理技術。其處理技術包括訊號解決方案、顯示、軟體應用、網路、儲存和安全處理。它透過以下地理區域開展業務：美國、亞太地區和歐洲。該公司成立於 1981 年 7 月 14 日，總部位於馬薩諸塞州安多弗。

info.description: Qfin Holdings, Inc. is a holding company, which engages in the provision of AI-empowered Credit-Tech platform. It provides comprehensive suite of technology services to assist financial institutions and consumers and SMEs in the loan lifecycle, ranging from borrower acquisition, preliminary credit assessment, fund matching and post-facilitation services. It is dedicated to making credit services more accessible and personalized to consumers and SMEs through Credit-Tech services to financial institutions. The company was founded on July 25, 2016 and is headquartered in Shanghai, China.
info.description_zh: Qfin Holdings, Inc.是一家控股公司，致力於提供人工智慧賦能的信用科技平台。它提供全面的技術服務，在貸款生命週期中為金融機構、消費者和中小企業提供幫助，包括借款人獲取、初步信用評估、資金匹配和後期便利服務。它致力於透過向金融機構提供信貸科技服務，讓消費者和中小企業更容易獲得和個人化的信貸服務。公司成立於2016年7月25日，總部位於中國上海。

info.description: AutoZone, Inc. engages in the retail and distribution of automotive replacement parts and accessories. It operates under the Auto Part Stores and Other segments. The company was founded by Joseph R. Hyde, III in 1979 and is headquartered in Memphis, TN.
info.description_zh: AutoZone, Inc. 從事汽車更換零件和配件的零售和分銷。它在汽車配件商店和其他部門下運作。該公司由 Joseph R. Hyde, III 於 1979 年創立，總部位於田納西州孟菲斯。

info.description: Cullinan Therapeutics, Inc. is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company, which engages in the developing of oncology and immuno-oncology therapies. Its pipeline includes CLN-978, CLN-619, Zipalertinib CLN-081/TAS6417, CLN-049, and CLN-617. The company was founded by Patrick A. Baeuerle on September 15, 2016 and is headquartered in Cambridge, MA.
info.description_zh: Cullinan Therapeutics, Inc.是一家臨床階段的生物製藥公司，從事腫瘤學和免疫腫瘤學療法的開發。其管路包括CLN-978、CLN-619、Zipalertinib CLN-081/TAS6417、CLN-049和CLN-617。該公司由 Patrick A. Baeuerle 於 2016 年 9 月 15 日創立，總部位於馬薩諸塞州劍橋。

info.description: The Williams Cos., Inc. operates as an energy infrastructure company, which explores, produces, transports, sells and processes natural gas and petroleum products. It operates through the following segments: Transmission and Gulf of Mexico, Northeast G&P, and West. The Transmission and Gulf of Mexico segment consists of interstate natural gas pipelines, the Transco and Northwest Pipelines, as well as natural gas gathering and processing and crude oil production handling and transportation assets in the Gulf Coast region. The Northeast G&P segment includes midstream gathering, processing, and fractionation businesses in the Marcellus Shale region primarily in Pennsylvania and New York, and the Utica Shale region of eastern Ohio. The West segment consists of gas gathering, processing, and treating operations in the Rocky Mountain region of Colorado and Wyoming, the Barnett Shale region of north-central Texas, the Eagle Ford Shale region of south Texas, the Haynesville Shale region of northwest Louisiana, and the Mid-Continent region which includes the Anadarko, Arkoma, and Permian basins. The company was founded by David Williams and Miller Williams in 1908 and is headquartered in Tulsa, OK.
info.description_zh: Williams Cos., Inc. 是一家能源基礎設施公司，從事天然氣和石油產品的勘探、生產、運輸、銷售和加工。該公司透過以下部門運作：傳輸和墨西哥灣部門、東北 G&P 部門和西部部門。傳輸和墨西哥灣部分包括州際天然氣管道、Transco 和西北管道，以及墨西哥灣沿岸地區的天然氣收集和加工以及原油生產處理和運輸資產。 Northeast G&P 部門包括主要位於賓夕法尼亞州和紐約州的馬塞勒斯頁岩地區以及俄亥俄州東部的尤蒂卡頁岩地區的中游收集、加工和分餾業務。西段包括科羅拉多州和懷俄明州落基山地區、德克薩斯州中北部巴尼特頁岩地區、德克薩斯州南部伊格爾福特頁岩地區、路易斯安那州西北部海恩斯維爾頁岩地區以及包括阿納達科盆地、阿科馬盆地和二疊紀盆地在內的中大陸地區的天然氣收集、加工和處理業務。該公司由 David Williams 和 Miller Williams 於 1908 年創立，總部位於俄克拉荷馬州塔爾薩。

info.description: Textron, Inc. is a multi-industry company, which leverages a global network of aircraft, defense, industrial, and finance businesses to customers. It operates through the following segments: Textron Aviation, Bell, Textron Systems, Industrial, Textron eAviation, and Finance. The Textron Aviation segment manufactures, sells, and services Beechcraft and Cessna aircraft. The Bell segment supplies military and commercial helicopters, tiltrotor aircraft, and related spare parts. The Textron Systems segment develops, manufactures, and integrates a variety of products and services for United States and international military. The Industrial segment designs and manufactures a variety of products within the Kautex and specialized vehicles product lines. The Textron eAviation segment covers pipistrel along with other research and development initiatives related to sustainable aviation solutions. The company was founded by Royal Little in 1923 and is headquartered in Providence, RI.
info.description_zh: 德事隆公司是一家跨產業公司，為客戶提供飛機、國防、工業和金融業務的全球網路。該公司透過以下部門運作：德事隆航空部門、貝爾部門、德事隆系統部門、工業部門、德事隆電子航空部門和金融部門。德事隆航空部門製造、銷售 Beechcraft 和 Cessna 飛機並提供服務。貝爾部門供應軍用和商用直升機、傾轉旋翼機以及相關零件。德事隆系統部門為美國和國際軍隊開發、製造和整合各種產品和服務。工業部門設計和製造考特斯和專用車輛產品線中的各種產品。德事隆 eAviation 部門涵蓋 pipistrel 以及與永續航空解決方案相關的其他研發計劃。該公司由 Royal Little 於 1923 年創立，總部位於羅德島州普羅維登斯。

info.description: Defiance Daily Target 2X Long SMCI ETF seeks daily investment results, before fees and expenses, of two times (200%) the daily percentage change in the share price of Super Micro Computer, Inc. (Nasdaq: SMCI"). The fund is an actively managed exchange traded fund ("ETF") that attempts to achieve two times (200%) the daily percentage change in the share price of the underlying security by entering into swap agreements on the underlying security. The fund is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: Defiance Daily Target 2X Long SMCI ETF 尋求在費用和開支之前，獲得 Super Micro Computer, Inc.（納斯達克股票代碼：SMCI”）股價每日百分比變化兩倍 (200%) 的每日投資結果。該基金是主動管理型交易所交易基金 (“ETF”)，試圖通過簽訂基礎證券掉期百分比來實現平均證券掉期百分比的兩倍 (20%)。

info.description: Gilat Satellite Networks Ltd. engages in the provision of broadband satellite communication and networking solutions and services. It operates through the following business segments: Fixed Networks, Mobility Solutions, and Terrestrial Infrastructure Projects. The Fixed Networks segment provides advanced fixed broadband satellite communication networks, satellite communication systems and associated professional services and comprehensive turnkey solutions and fully managed satellite network services solutions. The Mobility Solutions segment provides advanced on-the-move satellite communications equipment, systems, and solutions, including airborne, maritime and ground-mobile satellite systems and solutions. The Terrestrial Infrastructure Projects segment provides network infrastructure construction of the fiber and microwave network of PRONATEL in Peru. The company was founded by Yoel Gat, Gideon Kaplan, Amiram Levinberg, Joshua Levinberg, and Shlomo Tirosh in 1987 and is headquartered in Petah Tikva, Israel.
info.description_zh: Gilat Satellite Networks Ltd. 從事提供寬頻衛星通訊和網路解決方案及服務。它透過以下業務部門運作：固定網路、行動解決方案和地面基礎設施專案。固定網路部門提供先進的固定寬頻衛星通訊網路、衛星通訊系統和相關專業服務以及全面的交鑰匙解決方案和完全託管的衛星網路服務解決方案。行動解決方案部門提供先進的行動衛星通訊設備、系統和解決方案，包括機載、海上和地面移動衛星系統和解決方案。地面基礎設施專案部門為秘魯PRONATEL光纖和微波網路提供網路基礎設施建設。該公司由 Yoel Gat、Gideon Kaplan、Amiram Levinberg、Joshua Levinberg 和 Shlomo Tirosh 於 1987 年創立，總部位於以色列佩塔提克瓦。

info.description: DTE Energy Co. operates as a diversified energy company, which engages in the development and management of energy-related businesses and services. It operates through the following segments: Electric, Gas, DTE Vantage, Energy Trading, and Corporate and Other. The Electric segment consists of generation, purchase, distribution, and sale of electricity to residential, commercial, and industrial customers in southeastern Michigan. The Gas segment is involved in the purchase, storage, transportation, distribution, and sale of natural gas to residential, commercial, and industrial customers throughout Michigan, and the sale of storage and transportation capacity. The DTE Vantage segment focuses on projects that deliver energy and utility-type products and services to industrial, commercial, and institutional customers, produce reduced emissions fuel, and sell electricity and pipeline-quality gas from renewable energy projects. The Energy Trading segment covers energy marketing and trading operations. The Corporate and Other segment includes various holding company activities, holds certain non-utility debt, and holds certain investments, as well as funds supporting regional development and economic growth. The company was founded in January 1995 and is headquartered in Detroit, MI.
info.industry_zh: 公用事業 - 受監管的電力
info.description_zh: DTE Energy Co.是一家多元化能源公司，從事能源相關業務和服務的開發和管理。該公司透過以下部門運作：電力部門、天然氣部門、DTE Vantage 部門、能源貿易部門以及企業及其他部門。電力部門包括向密西根州東南部的住宅、商業和工業客戶發電、購買、分配和銷售電力。天然氣部門涉及向密西根州各地的住宅、商業和工業客戶購買、儲存、運輸、分銷和銷售天然氣，以及銷售儲存和運輸能力。 DTE Vantage 部門專注於向工業、商業和機構客戶提供能源和公用事業型產品和服務、生產減少排放的燃料以及銷售來自再生能源專案的電力和管道品質天然氣的專案。能源貿易部門涵蓋能源行銷和貿易業務。公司及其他部門包括各種控股公司活動，持有某些非公用事業債務，並持有某些投資以及支持區域發展和經濟成長的基金。該公司成立於 1995 年 1 月，總部位於密西根州底特律。

info.description: GraniteShares 2x Long SMCI Daily ETF seeks daily investment results, before fees and expenses, of 2 times (200%) the daily percentage change of the common stock of Super Micro Computer Inc. (NASDAQ: SMCI). The fund is an actively managed exchange traded fund that attempts to replicate 2 times (200%) the daily percentage change of the underlying stock by entering into financial instruments such as swaps and options on the Underlying Stock as well as directly purchasing underlying stock. The fund is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: GraniteShares 2x Long SMCI Daily ETF 尋求每日投資結果（扣除費用和開支）為 Super Micro Computer Inc.（納斯達克股票代碼：SMCI）普通股每日百分比變化的 2 倍（200%）。該基金是一檔主動管理的交易所交易基金，試圖透過進入標的股票的掉期和選擇權等金融工具以及直接購買標的股票來複製標的股票每日百分比變化的兩倍（200%）。該基金是非多元化的。

info.description: TMC the metals co., Inc. is a deep-sea minerals exploration company focused on the collection and processing of polymetallic nodules found on the seafloor in international waters of the Clarion Clipperton Zone in the Pacific Ocean (CCZ). These nodules contain high grades of four metals (nickel, copper, cobalt, manganese) which can be used as (i) feedstock for battery cathode precursors (nickel, cobalt and manganese sulfates, or intermediate nickel-copper-cobalt matte) for electric vehicles (EV) and renewable energy storage markets, (ii) copper cathode for EV wiring, energy transmission and other applications and (iii) manganese silicate for manganese alloy production required for steel production. The company was founded in 2021 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
info.description_zh: TMC the Metals Co., Inc. 是一家深海礦物勘探公司，專注於太平洋克拉里昂克利珀頓區 (CCZ) 國際水域海底發現的多金屬結核的收集和加工。這些結核含有高品位的四種金屬（鎳、銅、鈷、錳），可用作（i）電動車（EV）和可再生能源儲存市場的電池陰極前驅物（鎳、鈷和硫酸錳，或中間鎳銅鈷冰銅）的原料，（ii）用於電動車佈線、能量傳輸和其他應用的銅製陰極，以及用於鋼（iiiiii）用於鋼鐵的生產酸合金的生產。該公司成立於2021年，總部位於加拿大溫哥華。

info.description: Viridian Therapeutics, Inc. is a biopharmaceutical company that develops medicines for autoimmune and rare diseases. It uses antibody discovery and protein engineering to create new therapies. The company is advancing late-stage IGF-1R therapies for thyroid eye disease (TED) and developing a potential TSHR-targeted treatment for TED and Graves' disease. In addition, it is developing FcRn inhibitors, including VRDN-006 and VRDN-008, for multiple autoimmune diseases. The company was founded by William S. Marshall and Bruce L. Booth in February 2006 and is headquartered in Waltham, MA.
info.description_zh: Viridian Therapeutics, Inc. 是一家生物製藥公司，開發治療自體免疫疾病和罕見疾病的藥物。它利用抗體發現和蛋白質工程來創造新療法。該公司正在推進甲狀腺眼疾 (TED) 的後期 IGF-1R 療法，並開發針對 TED 和格雷夫茲病的潛在 TSHR 標靶療法。此外，該公司也正在開發用於多種自體免疫疾病的FcRn抑制劑，包括VRDN-006和VRDN-008。該公司由 William S. Marshall 和 Bruce L. Booth 於 2006 年 2 月創立，總部位於馬薩諸塞州沃爾瑟姆。

info.description: Jacobs Solutions, Inc. is a holding company, which engages in the designing and deployment of technology-centric solutions. It operates through the following business segments: Infrastructure and Advanced Facilities, and PA Consulting. The Infrastructure and Advanced Facilities segment includes solutions for complex challenges related to energy security, environmental resilience, safe and reliable transportation, buildings and infrastructure, integrated water management and biopharmaceutical manufacturing. The PA Consulting segment includes the investment in PA Consulting Group. The company was founded in 1947 and is headquartered in Dallas, TX.
info.description_zh: Jacobs Solutions, Inc.是一家控股公司，從事以技術為中心的解決方案的設計和部署。它透過以下業務部門運作：基礎設施和先進設施以及 PA 諮詢。基礎設施和先進設施部門包括針對能源安全、環境彈性、安全可靠的交通、建築和基礎設施、綜合水管理和生物製藥製造等複雜挑戰的解決方案。 PA Consulting 部門包括對 PA Consulting Group 的投資。該公司成立於 1947 年，總部位於德克薩斯州達拉斯。

info.description: APA Corp. explores for oil and natural gas through its subsidiaries. It produces oil and gas with operations in the United States, Egypt and the United Kingdom, and exploration activities offshore in Suriname. The company was founded in 1954 and is headquartered in Houston, TX.
info.industry_zh: 石油和天然氣勘探與生產
info.description_zh: APA Corp. 透過其子公司勘探石油和天然氣。該公司生產石油和天然氣，在美國、埃及和英國開展業務，並在蘇利南進行海上勘探活動。該公司成立於 1954 年，總部位於德克薩斯州休斯頓。

info.description: NICE Ltd. engages in the provision of enterprise software solutions and services. It operates through the following segments: Customer Engagement, and Financial Crime and Compliance Solutions. The Customer Engagement segment provides suites such as compliance and risk, workforce optimization, operational efficiency, customer experience, and sales and retention. The Financial Crime and Compliance Solutions segment includes embedded-AI solutions that identify risks and help prevent money laundering and fraud, as well as help ensure financial markets compliance in real-time. The company was founded on September 28, 1986 and is headquartered in Raanana, Israel.
info.description_zh: NICE Ltd. 從事提供企業軟體解決方案和服務。它透過以下部門運作：客戶參與部門、金融犯罪與合規解決方案部門。客戶參與部門提供合規性和風險、勞動力優化、營運效率、客戶體驗以及銷售和保留等套件。金融犯罪和合規解決方案部門包括嵌入式人工智慧解決方案，可識別風險並協助防止洗錢和欺詐，並協助確保金融市場即時合規。該公司成立於1986年9月28日，總部位於以色列Raanana。

info.description: Skycorp Solar Group Ltd. is a holding company which designs, develops, manufactures and sells solar PV products and solar power system solutions services, through its indirectly wholly owned subsidiary. Its products include One-stop Solar system, Inverter, LFP Battery, Balcony Storage, and PV Cable. It operates through the following segments: Solar PV Products, High Performance Computing Products, and Others. The Solar PV Products segment includes servers, photovoltaic cable, and photovoltaic connectors. The High Performance Computing Products segment refers to the HPC servers and accessories delivered to the customers. The company was founded on January 19, 2022 and is headquartered in Ningbo, China.
info.description_zh: Skycorp Solar Group Ltd.是一家透過其間接全資子公司設計、開發、製造和銷售太陽能光電產品和太陽能發電系統解決方案服務的控股公司。其產品包括一站式太陽能係統、逆變器、磷酸鐵鋰電池、陽台儲能和光伏電纜。它透過以下部門運作：太陽能光伏產品部門、高效能運算產品部門和其他部門。太陽能光電產品部門包括伺服器、光電電纜和光電連接器。高效能運算產品部分是指交付給客戶的 HPC 伺服器和配件。公司成立於2022年1月19日，總部位於中國寧波。

info.description: Huachen AI Parking Management Technology Holding Co., Ltd. engages in the provision of smart parking solutions and equipment structural parts. Its products include structural parts, garage structural parts, materials such as customized steel and load bearing steel plates for cubic parking equipment, and railroad accessories. The company was founded by Lu Bin on September 30, 2021 and is headquartered in Jiaxing, China.
info.description_zh: 華辰人工智慧停車管理科技控股有限公司從事提供智慧停車解決方案及設備結構件。產品包括結構件、車庫結構件、立體停車設備客製化鋼材、承重鋼板等材料、鐵路配件等。該公司由陸斌於2021年9月30日創立，總部位於中國嘉興。

info.description: Ernexa Therapeutics, Inc. engages in the provision of cell engineering therapies. It is involved in the development of mRNA cell engineering technologies to repair cellular dysfunction and treat a range of therapeutic indications. The company was founded in 1984 and is headquartered in Cambridge, MA.
info.description_zh: Ernexa Therapeutics, Inc. 從事提供細胞工程療法。它參與開發 mRNA 細胞工程技術來修復細胞功能障礙並治療一系列治療適應症。該公司成立於 1984 年，總部位於馬薩諸塞州劍橋。

info.description: uniQure NV engages in the discovery, development, and commercialization of innovative gene therapies. Its discoveries intend to treat hemophilia, Huntington's disease, glybera, and cardiovascular problems. The company was founded by Sander J. van Deventer in 1998 and is headquartered in Amsterdam, Netherlands.
info.description_zh: uniQure NV 致力於創新基因療法的發現、開發和商業化。其發現旨在治療血友病、亨廷頓舞蹈症、甘油和心血管問題。該公司由 Sander J. van Deventer 於 1998 年創立，總部位於荷蘭阿姆斯特丹。

info.description: Cue Biopharma, Inc. is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company, which engages in the development of immunotherapies to treat cancer and autoimmune diseases. Its products include CUE-400 series (autoimmune diseases), CUE-500 series (targeted cell depletion), and CUE-100 series (Oncology). The company was founded by Ronald D. Seidel III, Steven Almo, and Rodolfo Chaparro on December 31, 2014 and is headquartered in Boston, MA.
info.description_zh: Cue Biopharma, Inc.是一家臨床階段的生物製藥公司，致力於開發治療癌症和自體免疫疾病的免疫療法。其產品包括CUE-400系列（自體免疫疾病）、CUE-500系列（靶向細胞去除）和CUE-100系列（腫瘤）。該公司由 Ronald D. Seidel III、Steven Almo 和 Rodolfo Chaparro 於 2014 年 12 月 31 日創立，總部位於馬薩諸塞州波士頓。

info.description: Frontier Group Holdings, Inc. engages in the provision of air transportation. The company was founded on July 5, 1994 and is headquartered in Denver, CO.
info.description_zh: Frontier Group Holdings, Inc. 從事提供航空運輸業務。該公司成立於1994年7月5日，總部位於科羅拉多州丹佛市。

info.description: Vertex, Inc. engages in the provision of tax compliance software solutions. The firm offers comprehensive solutions that automate end-to-end indirect tax processes for enterprises and mid-market companies with complex tax transactions. Its software enables tax determination, data management, compliance and reporting, and document management. The company was founded by Ray Westphal and Antoinette Westphal in 1978 and is headquartered in King of Prussia, PA.
info.description_zh: Vertex, Inc. 從事提供稅務合規軟體解決方案。該公司提供全面的解決方案，為具有複雜稅務交易的企業和中型市場公司實現端到端間接稅務流程的自動化。其軟體支援稅務確定、資料管理、合規性和報告以及文件管理。該公司由 Ray Westphal 和 Antoinette Westphal 於 1978 年創立，總部位於賓夕法尼亞州普魯士國王。

info.description: Atlas Lithium Corp. operates as a U.S. mineral exploration and mining company with projects and properties in essentially all battery metals, including lithium, rare earths, graphite, nickel, cobalt, and titanium. The firm focuses on developing its hard-rock lithium project located in a premier pegmatitic district in Brazil Minas Gerais and Northeastern Brazil. Additionally, through subsidiaries, it participates in iron, gold, and quartzite projects and owns multiple mining concessions for gold, diamond, and industrial sand. The company was founded on December 15, 2011 and is headquartered in Minas Gerais,BR.
info.description_zh: Atlas Lithium Corp.是一家美國礦產勘探和採礦公司，擁有幾乎所有電池金屬的專案和財產，包括鋰、稀土、石墨、鎳、鈷和鈦。該公司專注於開發位於巴西米納斯吉拉斯州和巴西東北部首要偉晶岩地區的硬岩鋰計畫。此外，它還透過子公司參與鐵、金和石英岩項目，並擁有多個黃金、鑽石和工業砂的採礦特許權。該公司成立於2011年12月15日，總部位於巴西米納斯吉拉斯州。

info.description: Netskope, Inc. engages in the provision of cloud based security solutions. It offers business developing analytics for visibility, policy enforcement and other cloud solutions. Its products include Netskope one SASE, Netskope one SSE, cloud access security broker, next generation secure web gateway, private access, cloud firewall, SD-WAN and skopeAI. The company was founded by Sanjay Beri, Lebin Cheng, Ravishankar Ithal, and Krishna Narayanaswamy in October 2012 and is headquartered in Santa Clara, CA.
info.description_zh: Netskope, Inc. 致力於提供基於雲端的安全解決方案。它為業務開發分析提供可見性、策略執行和其他雲端解決方案。其產品包括Netskope one SASE、Netskope one SSE、雲端存取安全代理、新一代安全Web網關、私有存取、雲端防火牆、SD-WAN和skopeAI。該公司由 Sanjay Beri、Lebin Cheng、Ravishankar Ithal 和 Krishna Narayanaswamy 於 2012 年 10 月創立，總部位於加州聖克拉拉。

info.description: Collegium Pharmaceutical, Inc. is a pharmaceutical company, which engages in development and planning to commercialize next generation, abuse-deterrent products for the treatment of patients suffering from chronic pain and other diseases. Its products include Xtampza ER, Nucynta ER and Nucynta IR, Belbuca, and Symproic. The company was founded by Michael Thomas Heffernan in April 2002 and is headquartered in Stoughton, MA.
info.industry_zh: 藥品製造商 - 特用藥品和非專利藥品
info.description_zh: Collegium Pharmaceutical, Inc. 是一家製藥公司，致力於開發併計劃將下一代防濫用產品商業化，用於治療患有慢性疼痛和其他疾病的患者。其產品包括 Xtampza ER、Nucynta ER 和 Nucynta IR、Belbuca 和 Symproic。該公司由 Michael Thomas Heffernan 於 2002 年 4 月創立，總部位於馬薩諸塞州斯托頓。

info.description: Advanced Biomed, Inc. operates as a holding company with interests in developing biochip technologies. It engages in the research & development of microfluidic biochip technologies and provides tumor diagnosis and treatment technology applications. The company was founded by Yi Lu and Steven I-Fang Cheng in 2014 and is headquartered in Tainan, Taiwan.
info.description_zh: Advanced Biomed, Inc. 作為一家控股公司運營，致力於開發生物晶片技術。從事微流控生物晶片技術研發並提供腫瘤診療技術應用。該公司由 Yi Lu 和 Steven I-Fang Cheng 於 2014 年創立，總部位於台灣台南。

info.description: Avalo Therapeutics, Inc. is a clinical stage biotechnology company, which engages in the treatment of immune dysregulation by developing therapies that target the LIGHT-signaling network. It also focuses on reducing LIGHT levels which can moderate immune dysregulation in many acute and chronic inflammatory disorders. The company was founded by Blake M. Paterson, Isaac Blech, Barbara S. Slusher, and Solomon H. Snyder on January 31, 2011 and is headquartered in Wayne, PA.
info.description_zh: Avalo Therapeutics, Inc. 是一家臨床階段生物技術公司，透過開發針對光訊號網路的療法來治療免疫失調。它還專注於降低光水平，從而緩解許多急性和慢性發炎性疾病中的免疫失調。該公司由 Blake M. Paterson、Isaac Blech、Barbara S. Slusher 和 Solomon H. Snyder 於 2011 年 1 月 31 日創立，總部位於賓夕法尼亞州韋恩。

info.description: Sprout Social, Inc. engages in the provision of online social media management tools for businesses. It offers communication tools, contact management, lead generation, and analytics services. The firm also offers solutions for enterprises, agencies, small businesses, customer service, social media marketing, and employee advocacy sectors. The company was founded by Justyn Howard, Aaron Rankin, Gilbert Lara, and Peter Soung on April 21, 2010 and is headquartered in Chicago, IL.
info.description_zh: Sprout Social, Inc. 致力於為企業提供線上社群媒體管理工具。它提供通訊工具、聯絡人管理、潛在客戶開發和分析服務。該公司也為企業、機構、小型企業、客戶服務、社群媒體行銷和員工倡導領域提供解決方案。該公司由 Justyn Howard、Aaron Rankin、Gilbert Lara 和 Peter Soung 於 2010 年 4 月 21 日創立，總部位於伊利諾伊州芝加哥。

info.description: Candel Therapeutics, Inc. is a clinical stage biotechnology company, which engages in the development and commercialization of viral immunotherapies. Its pipeline includes CAN-2409 and CAN-3110. The company was founded by Estuardo Aguilar-Cordova in 2002 and is headquartered in Needham, MA.
info.description_zh: Error 500 (Server Error)!!1500.That’s an error.There was an error. Please try again later.That’s all we know.

info.description: Grid Dynamics Holdings, Inc. engages in the provision of technology consulting, platform and product engineering, and advanced analytics services. It operates through the following geographical segments: United States, United Kingdom, Netherlands, and Other. The company was founded by Victoria Livschitz in 2006 and is headquartered in San Ramon, CA.
info.description_zh: Grid Dynamics Holdings, Inc. 從事提供技術諮詢、平台和產品工程以及高級分析服務。它透過以下地理區域開展業務：美國、英國、荷蘭和其他地區。該公司由 Victoria Livschitz 於 2006 年創立，總部位於加州聖拉蒙。

info.description: Duolingo, Inc. is a language-learning website and mobile application, which engages in the development of a free language learning website and crowd sourced text translation platform. It offers Duolingo for Schools, a free, web-based tool that aims to make it easier for teachers to use the Duolingo platform in a structured learning environment, and English Test, an online, on-demand assessment of English proficiency. The company was founded by Luis von Ahn and Severin Hacker in 2011 and is headquartered in Pittsburgh, PA.
info.description_zh: Duolingo, Inc. 是語言學習網站和行動應用程序，致力於開發免費語言學習網站和眾包文字翻譯平台。它提供了 Duolingo for Schools（一種基於網路的免費工具，旨在讓教師更輕鬆地在結構化學習環境中使用 Duolingo 平台）和 English Test（一種線上按需英語程度評估）。該公司由 Luis von Ahn 和 Severin Hacker 於 2011 年創立，總部位於賓州匹茲堡。

info.description: Autodesk, Inc. engages in the design of software and services. Its products include AutoCAD, BIM Collaborate Pro, Revit, Civil 3D, Fusion 360, InfraWorks, Inventor, Maya, PlanGrid, Revit, Shotgun, and 3ds Max. The firm also offers product development and manufacturing software, which provides manufacturers in the automotive, transportation, industrial machinery, consumer products, and building product industries with digital design, engineering, and production solutions. The firm is also involved in digital media and entertainment, which consists of tools for digital sculpting, modeling, animation, effects, rendering, and compositing for design visualization, visual effects, and games production. The company was founded by John Walker in April 1982 and is headquartered in San Francisco, CA.
info.description_zh: Autodesk, Inc. 從事軟體和服務設計。其產品包括 AutoCAD、BIM Collaborate Pro、Revit、Civil 3D、Fusion 360、InfraWorks、Inventor、Maya、PlanGrid、Revit、Shotgun 和 3ds Max。該公司還提供產品開發和製造軟體，為汽車、運輸、工業機械、消費品和建築產品行業的製造商提供數位設計、工程和生產解決方案。該公司還涉足數位媒體和娛樂領域，其中包括用於設計視覺化、視覺效果和遊戲製作的數位雕刻、建模、動畫、效果、渲染和合成工具。該公司由 John Walker 於 1982 年 4 月創立，總部位於加州舊金山。

info.description: GRAIL, Inc. operates as a commercial-stage healthcare company, which engages in the development of a technology for early detection of cancer. It utilizes machine learning, software, and automation to detect and identify multiple deadly cancer types in earlier stages. The company was founded by Jeffrey T. Huber, William H. Rastetter, Mostafa Ronaghi, and Richard D. Klausner on September 11, 2015 and is headquartered in Menlo Park, CA.
info.description_zh: GRAIL, Inc. 是一家商業階段的醫療保健公司，致力於癌症早期檢測技術的開發。它利用機器學習、軟體和自動化來檢測和識別早期階段的多種致命癌症類型。該公司由 Jeffrey T. Huber、William H. Rastetter、Mostafa Ronaghi 和 Richard D. Klausner 於 2015 年 9 月 11 日創立，總部位於加州門洛帕克。

info.description: DraftKings, Inc. is a digital sports entertainment and gaming company, which engages in the provision of online sports betting, online casino, daily fantasy sports product offerings, DraftKings Marketplace, retail sportsbook, media, and other consumer product offerings. The company was founded by Jason D. Robins, Matthew Kalish, and Paul Liberman on December 31, 2011 and is headquartered in Boston, MA.
info.description_zh: DraftKings, Inc.是一家數位運動娛樂和遊戲公司，從事提供線上體育博彩、線上賭場、每日夢幻體育產品、DraftKings Marketplace、零售體育博彩、媒體和其他消費性產品。該公司由 Jason D. Robins、Matthew Kalish 和 Paul Liberman 於 2011 年 12 月 31 日創立，總部位於馬薩諸塞州波士頓。

info.description: Fluence Energy, Inc. engages in energy storage products and services, and artificial intelligence-enabled digital applications for renewables and storage. Its storage includes Smartstack, Gridstack Pro, Grisdtack, and Ultrastack. The company was founded on June 21, 2021, and is headquartered in Arlington, VA.
info.industry_zh: 公用事業 - 再生能源
info.description_zh: Fluence Energy, Inc.從事能源儲存產品和服務，以及用於再生能源和儲存的人工智慧數位應用。其儲存包括Smartstack、Gridstack Pro、Grisdtack和Ultrastack。該公司成立於2021年6月21日，總部位於維吉尼亞州阿靈頓。

info.description: ZoomInfo Technologies, Inc. is a holding company, which engages in the provision of a cloud-based platform that offers information on organizations and professionals for sales and marketing teams. It offers sales leadership, sales development, marketing, and demand generation, sales and marketing operations, and recruiting. The company was founded by Henry L. Schuck and Kirk N. Brown in 2007 and is headquartered in Vancouver, WA.
info.description_zh: ZoomInfo Technologies, Inc. 是一家控股公司，致力於提供基於雲端的平台，為銷售和行銷團隊提供有關組織和專業人員的資訊。它提供銷售領導、銷售開發、行銷和需求產生、銷售和行銷營運以及招聘等服務。該公司由 Henry L. Schuck 和 Kirk N. Brown 於 2007 年創立，總部位於華盛頓州溫哥華。

info.description: Akamai Technologies, Inc. engages in the provision of cloud services for delivering, optimizing, and securing content and business applications over the Internet. Its products include security, web performance, media delivery, and network operator. The company was founded by Frank T. Leighton, Jonathan Seelig, Randall S. Kaplan, and Daniel M. Lewin on August 20, 1998 and is headquartered in Cambridge, MA.
info.description_zh: Akamai Technologies, Inc. 致力於提供雲端服務，以透過網路交付、優化和保護內容和業務應用程式。其產品包括安全性、網路效能、媒體交付和網路營運商。該公司由 Frank T. Leighton、Jonathan Seelig、Randall S. Kaplan 和 Daniel M. Lewin 於 1998 年 8 月 20 日創立，總部位於麻薩諸塞州劍橋。

info.description: AvePoint, Inc. operates as a digital collaboration innovator, which provides data management services. It develops, markets, and sells its suite of software solutions and services in North America, Europe, Australia, and Asia. The company was founded on July 24, 2001 and is headquartered in Jersey City, NJ.
info.description_zh: AvePoint, Inc. 是一家提供資料管理服務的數位協作創新者。該公司在北美、歐洲、澳洲和亞洲開發、行銷和銷售其軟體解決方案和服務套件。該公司成立於2001年7月24日，總部位於新澤西州澤西市。

info.description: Elong Power Holding Ltd. engages in the research and development, manufacturing, sales and service of high-power lithium-ion batteries for electric vehicles and construction machinery, as well as large-capacity, long-cycle lithium-ion batteries for energy storage systems. The company was founded on August 18, 2023 and is headquartered in Ganzhou, China.
info.description_zh: 藝龍動力控股有限公司從事電動車、工程機械用高功率鋰離子電池以及儲能係統用大容量、長循環鋰離子電池的研發、製造、銷售和服務。公司成立於2023年8月18日，總部位於中國贛州。

info.description: Cytokinetics, Inc. is a biopharmaceutical company, which is focused on discovering, developing, and commercializing muscle activators and muscle inhibitors as potential treatments for people with debilitating diseases in which muscle performance is compromised and/or declining. The firm is developing small molecule drug candidates specifically engineered to impact muscle function and contractility. Its clinical-stage drug candidates include omecamtiv mecarbil, a novel cardiac myosin activator, CK-136, a novel cardiac troponin activator, reldesemtiv, a novel fast skeletal muscle troponin activator, aficamten, a novel cardiac myosin inhibitor, and CK-3772271, a novel cardiac myosin inhibitor. The company was founded by Ronald D. Vale, Lawrence S. B. Goldstein, James H. Sabry, and James A. Spudich in 1997 and is headquartered in South San Francisco, CA.
info.description_zh: Cytokinetics, Inc. 是一家生物製藥公司，專注於發現、開發和商業化肌肉激活劑和肌肉抑製劑，作為肌肉性能受損和/或下降的衰弱性疾病患者的潛在治療方法。該公司正在開發專門用於影響肌肉功能和收縮性的小分子候選藥物。其臨床階段候選藥物包括新型心肌肌球蛋白激活劑omecamtiv mecarbil、新型心肌肌鈣蛋白激活劑CK-136、新型快速骨骼肌肌鈣蛋白激活劑reldesemtiv、新型心肌肌球蛋白抑製劑aficamten和新型心肌肌球蛋白抑製劑CK-3772271。該公司由 Ronald D. Vale、Lawrence S. B. Goldstein、James H. Sabry 和 James A. Spudich 於 1997 年創立，總部位於加州南舊金山。

info.description: Monolithic Power Systems, Inc. designs, develops, and markets integrated power semiconductor solutions and power delivery architectures for computing and storage, automotive, industrial, communications, and consumer applications markets. The firm's products include portable electronic devices, wireless LAN access points, computers and notebooks, monitors, infotainment applications, and medical equipment. It operates through the following geographical segments: China, US, Taiwan, and Other. The company was founded by Michael R. Hsing, and James C. Moyer on August 22, 1997, and is headquartered in West Palm Beach, FL.
info.description_zh: Monolithic Power Systems, Inc. 為運算和儲存、汽車、工業、通訊和消費應用市場設計、開發和銷售整合式功率半導體解決方案和電力傳輸架構。該公司的產品包括便攜式電子設備、無線區域網路存取點、電腦和筆記型電腦、顯示器、資訊娛樂應用和醫療設備。它透過以下地理區域開展業務：中國、美國、台灣和其他地區。該公司由 Michael R. Hsing 和 James C. Moyer 於 1997 年 8 月 22 日創立，總部位於佛羅裡達州西棕櫚灘。

info.description: ONEOK, Inc. engages in gathering, processing, fractionating, transporting, storing and marketing of natural gas. It operates through the following segments: Natural Gas Gathering and Processing, Natural Gas Liquids and Natural Gas Pipelines. The Natural Gas Gathering and Processing segment offers midstream services to producers in North Dakota, Montana, Wyoming, Kansas and Oklahoma. The Natural Gas Liquids segment owns and operates facilities that gather, fractionate, treat and distribute NGLs and store NGL products, in Oklahoma, Kansas, Texas, New Mexico and the Rocky Mountain region, which includes the Williston, Powder River and DJ Basins, where it provides midstream services to producers of NGLs and deliver those products to the two market centers, one in the Mid-Continent in Conway, Kansas and the other in the Gulf Coast in Mont Belvieu, Texas. The Natural Gas Pipelines segment provides transportation and storage services to end users. The company was founded in 1906 and is headquartered in Tulsa, OK.
info.description_zh: ONEOK, Inc. 從事天然氣的收集、加工、分餾、運輸、儲存和行銷。它透過以下部門運作：天然氣收集和加工、液化天然氣和天然氣管道。天然氣收集和加工部門為北達科他州、蒙大拿州、懷俄明州、堪薩斯州和俄克拉荷馬州的生產商提供中游服務。液化天然氣部門在俄克拉荷馬州、堪薩斯州、德克薩斯州、新墨西哥州和落基山脈地區（包括威利斯頓盆地、粉河流域和DJ盆地）擁有並經營收集、分餾、處理和分銷液化天然氣以及儲存液化天然氣產品的設施，在這些地區為液化天然氣生產商提供中游服務，並將這些產品運送到兩個市場中心，一個位於堪薩斯州康威的中大陸，另一個位於堪薩斯州康威的天然氣管道部門為最終用戶提供運輸和儲存服務。該公司成立於 1906 年，總部位於俄克拉荷馬州塔爾薩。

info.description: Phillips 66 engages in the processing, transportation, storage, and marketing of fuels and other related products. The company operates through the following segments: Midstream, Chemicals, Refining, Renewable Fuels, Marketing and Specialties, and Corporate and Other. The Midstream segment provides crude oil and refined products transportation, terminal, and processing services, as well as natural gas, natural gas liquids, and liquefied petroleum gas transportation, storage, processing, and marketing services. The Chemicals segment produces and markets petrochemicals and plastics worldwide. The Refining segment refines crude oil and other feedstocks into petroleum products such as gasoline, distillates, and aviation fuels. The Marketing and Specialties segment purchases for resale and markets refined petroleum products such as base oils and lubricants, and power generation operations. The Renewable Fuels segment processes renewable feedstocks into renewable products at the Rodeo Renewable Energy Complex (Rodeo Complex) and at Humber Refinery. The company was founded in 1875 and is headquartered in Houston, TX.
info.industry_zh: 石油與天然氣精煉與行銷
info.description_zh: Phillips 66 從事燃料及其他相關產品的加工、運輸、儲存和行銷。該公司透過以下部門運作：中游部門、化學品部門、煉油部門、再生燃料部門、行銷和特殊部門以及企業和其他部門。中游部門提供原油和成品油運輸、碼頭和加工服務，以及天然氣、液化天然氣和液化石油氣運輸、儲存、加工和行銷服務。化學品部門在全球範圍內生產和銷售石化產品和塑膠。煉油部門將原油和其他原料精煉成汽油、餾分油和航空燃料等石油產品。行銷和特種產品部門採購轉售和行銷精煉石油產品，如基礎油和潤滑油，以及發電業務。再生燃料部門在 Rodeo 再生能源綜合體（Rodeo Complex）和 Humber 煉油廠將再生原料加工成再生產品。該公司成立於 1875 年，總部位於德克薩斯州休斯頓。

info.description: Power Integrations, Inc. designs and develops mixed-signal integrated circuits and other electronic components and circuitry used in high-voltage power conversion. Its products include AC-DC Conversion, LED Drivers, Gate Drivers, Motor Drivers, and Automotive Solutions. The company was founded by Klas Eklund, Art Fury and Steven J. Sharp on March 25, 1988 and is headquartered in San Jose, CA.
info.description_zh: Power Integrations, Inc. 設計和開發混合訊號積體電路以及用於高壓電源轉換的其他電子元件和電路。其產品包括 AC-DC 轉換、LED 驅動器、閘極驅動器、馬達驅動器和汽車解決方案。該公司由 Klas Eklund、Art Fury 和 Steven J. Sharp 於 1988 年 3 月 25 日創立，總部位於加州聖荷西。

info.description: EOG Resources, Inc. engages in the exploration, development, production and marketing of crude oil and natural gas. It operates through the United States, Trinidad, and Other International geographical segments. The Other International segment includes China and Canada operations. The company was founded in 1985 and is headquartered in Houston, TX.
info.industry_zh: 石油和天然氣勘探與生產
info.description_zh: EOG Resources, Inc.從事原油和天然氣的勘探、開發、生產和行銷。它透過美國、特立尼達和其他國際地理部門開展業務。其他國際部門包括中國和加拿大業務。該公司成立於 1985 年，總部位於德克薩斯州休士頓。

info.description: GraniteShares 2x Long RDDT Daily ETF seeks daily investment results, before fees and expenses, of 2 times (200%) the daily percentage change of the common stock of Reddit Inc. The fund is an actively managed exchange traded fund that attempts to replicate 2 times (200%) daily percentage change of the underlying stock by entering financial instruments such as swaps and options on the underlying stock as well as directly purchasing the underlying stock. The fund is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: GraniteShares 2x Long RDDT Daily ETF 尋求未計費用和開支的每日投資結果為 Reddit Inc. 普通股每日百分比變化的 2 倍 (200%)。該基金是一檔主動管理的交易所交易基金，試圖透過輸入標的股票掉期和選擇權等金融工具以及直接購買標的股票來複製標的股票每日百分比變化的 2 倍 (200%)。該基金是非多元化的。

info.description: CNS Pharmaceuticals, Inc. is a preclinical stage pharmaceutical company, which engages in the development of anticancer drug candidates for the treatment of primary and metastatic brain and central nervous system tumors. Its product pipeline includes berubicin, and CNS-12. The company was founded by Waldemar Priebe in July 2017 and is headquartered in Houston, TX.
info.description_zh: CNS Pharmaceuticals, Inc.是一家臨床前階段製藥公司，致力於開發用於治療原發性和轉移性腦部和中樞神經系統腫瘤的抗癌候選藥物。其產品管線包括貝柔比星和CNS-12。該公司由 Waldemar Priebe 於 2017 年 7 月創立，總部位於德克薩斯州休斯頓。

info.description: EverQuote, Inc. operates as an online insurance marketplace connecting consumers with insurance providers. It offers car, home and life insurance. The firm's data and technology platform matches and connects consumers seeking to purchase insurance with relevant options from its broad direct network of insurance providers. The company was founded by Seth N. Birnbaum, David B. Blundin, and Tomas Revesz in August 1, 2008 and is headquartered in Cambridge, MA.
info.description_zh: EverQuote, Inc. 是一個連結消費者與保險提供者的線上保險市場。它提供汽車、房屋和人壽保險。該公司的數據和技術平台將尋求購買保險的消費者與其廣泛的直接保險提供者網路中的相關選項進行配對和連接。該公司由 Seth N. Birnbaum、David B. Blundin 和 Tomas Revesz 於 2008 年 8 月 1 日創立，總部位於馬薩諸塞州劍橋。

info.description: GraniteShares 2x Long IONQ Daily ETF seeks daily investment results, before fees and expenses, of 2 times (200%) the daily percentage change of the common stock of IonQ, Inc. The fund is an actively managed exchange traded fund that attempts to replicate 2 times (200%) daily percentage change of the underlying stock by entering financial instruments such as swaps and options on the underlying stock as well as directly purchasing the underlying stock. The fund is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: GraniteShares 2x 多頭 IONQ 每日 ETF 尋求未計費用和開支的每日投資結果為 IonQ, Inc. 普通股每日百分比變化的 2 倍 (200%)。該基金是一檔主動管理的交易所交易基金，試圖透過輸入標的股票掉期和選擇權等金融工具以及直接購買標的股票來複製標的股票每日百分比變化的 2 倍 (200%)。該基金是非多元化的。

info.description: Energy Recovery, Inc. engages in the design and manufacture of industrial fluid flow solutions. It operates through the following segments: Water, Emerging Technologies, and Corporate. The Water segment deals with the development, sales, and support of the PX, Turbochargers and pumps used in seawater desalination and industrial wastewater activities. The Emerging Technologies segment is composed of the development of the PX G1300 used in industrial and commercial refrigeration applications. The company was founded in April 1992 and is headquartered in San Leandro, CA.
info.description_zh: Energy Recovery, Inc. 從事工業流體流動解決方案的設計和製造。它透過以下部門運作：水務部門、新興技術部門和企業部門。水務部門負責海水淡化和工業廢水活動中使用的 PX、渦輪增壓器和泵浦的開發、銷售和支援。新興技術部分由用於工業和商業冷凍應用的 PX G1300 的開發組成。該公司成立於 1992 年 4 月，總部位於加州聖萊安德羅。

info.description: Defiance Daily Target 2X Long IONQ ETF seeks daily leveraged investment results of two times (200%) the daily percentage change in the share price of IonQ, Inc. (NYSE: IONQ). The fund is an actively managed ETF that attempts to achieve two times (200%) the daily percentage change in the share price of the underlying security by employing derivatives, namely swap agreements and/or listed options contracts. The fund is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: Defiance 每日目標 2 倍多頭 IONQ ETF 尋求 IonQ, Inc.（NYSE：IONQ）每日股價變動百分比兩倍 (200%) 的每日槓桿投資結果。該基金是一種主動管理的 ETF，試圖透過使用衍生性商品（即掉期協議和/或上市選擇權合約）來實現基礎證券股價每日百分比變化的兩倍 (200%)。該基金是非多元化的。

info.description: Moolec Science SA engages in the development and production of science-based food ingredients. Its products include pet food, animal feed, and dietary supplements. It operates through the following segments: Seed and Integrated Products, Crop Protection, Crop Nutrition, and Emerging Solutions. The company was founded by Gaston Paladini, Henk Hoogenkamp, and Martin Salinas in 2020 and is headquartered in George Town, Cayman Islands.
