info.description_zh: Moolec Science SA 致力於科學食品配料的開發和生產。其產品包括寵物食品、動物飼料和膳食補充劑。該公司透過以下部門運作：種子和綜合產品、作物保護、作物營養和新興解決方案。該公司由 Gaston Paladini、Henk Hoogenkamp 和 Martin Salinas 於 2020 年創立，總部位於開曼群島喬治敦。

info.description: SKK Holdings Ltd. operates as a holding company, which engages in the provision of civil engineering services in subsurface utility works, including power and telecommunication cable laying, water pipeline and sewer rehabilitation works. The company was founded by Chun Seong Ng and Koon Kiat Sze on October 16, 2013 and is headquartered in Singapore.
info.description_zh: SKK Holdings Ltd.作為一家控股公司運營，從事提供地下公用事業工程的土木工程服務，包括電力和電信電纜鋪設、供水管道和下水道修復工程。該公司由Chun Seong Ng和Koon Kiat Sze於2013年10月16日創立，總部位於新加坡。

info.description: ICON plc operates as a clinical research organization, which engages in the provision of outsourced development services to the pharmaceutical, biotechnology, and medical device industries. It specializes in the development, management and analysis of programs that support clinical development. It operates through the following geographical segments: Ireland, Rest of Europe, U.S. and Other. The company was founded by John Climax and Ronan Lambe in June 1990 and is headquartered in Dublin, Ireland.
info.description_zh: ICON plc 是一家臨床研究組織，致力於為製藥、生物技術和醫療器材產業提供外包開發服務。它專門從事支持臨床開發的項目的開發、管理和分析。它透過以下地理區域開展業務：愛爾蘭、歐洲其他地區、美國和其他地區。該公司由 John Climax 和 Ronan Lambe 於 1990 年 6 月創立，總部位於愛爾蘭都柏林。

info.description: Lindblad Expeditions Holdings, Inc. engages in the provision of expedition cruising and travel services. It operates through the Lindblad and Natural Habitat segments. The Lindblad segment primarily includes sea-based expeditions. The Natural Habitat segment offers land-based, eco-conscious expeditions. The company was founded by Sven-Olof Lindblad on August 9, 2010 and is headquartered in New York, NY.
info.description_zh: Lindblad Expeditions Holdings, Inc. 从事提供探险巡航和旅行服务。它通过 Lindblad 和 Natural Habitat 部门运营。 Lindblad 部門主要包括海上探險。自然栖息地部分提供陆地、生态意识的探险活动。该公司由 Sven-Olof Lindblad 于 2010 年 8 月 9 日创立，总部位于纽约州纽约市。

info.description: The Estee Lauder Companies, Inc. engages in the manufacture of skin care, makeup, fragrance and hair care products. It sells products under Estee Lauder, Clinique, Origins, MAC, Bobbi Brown, La Mer, Jo Malone London, Aveda and Too Faced. The company was founded by Estee Lauder and Joseph Lauder in 1946 and is headquartered in New York, NY.
info.description_zh: 雅詩蘭黛公司從事護膚、化妝品、香水和護髮產品的製造。該公司銷售雅詩蘭黛、倩碧、Origins、MAC、Bobbi Brown、La Mer、Jo Malone London、Aveda 和 Too Faced 品牌的產品。該公司由雅詩蘭黛和約瑟夫蘭黛於 1946 年創立，總部位於紐約州紐約。

info.description: Waters Corp. engages in the provision of workflow solutions involving liquid chromatography, mass spectrometry, and thermal analysis. It operates through the Waters and TA (TA Instruments) segments. The Waters segment consists of liquid chromatography instruments, mass spectrometry, and precision chemistry consumable products and services. The TA segment products and services include thermal analysis, rheometry and calorimetry instrument systems, and service sales. The company was founded by James Logan Waters in 1958 and is headquartered in Milford, MA.
info.description_zh: Waters Corp. 提供涉及液相層析、質譜和熱分析的工作流程解決方案。它透過 Waters 和 TA (TA Instruments) 部門運作。沃特世部門包括液相層析儀器、質譜儀以及精密化學消耗品和服務。 TA 部門的產品和服務包括熱分析、流變和量熱儀器系統以及服務銷售。該公司由 James Logan Waters 於 1958 年創立，總部位於馬薩諸塞州米爾福德。

info.description: Eli Lilly & Co. engages in the discovery, development, manufacture, and sale of pharmaceutical products. The firm's products include diabetes, oncology, immunology, neuroscience, and other products and therapies. The company was founded by Eli Lilly on May 10, 1876 and is headquartered in Indianapolis, IN.
info.description_zh: 禮來公司 (Eli Lilly & Co.) 從事醫藥產品的發現、開發、製造和銷售。該公司的產品包括糖尿病、腫瘤學、免疫學、神經科學以及其他產品和療法。該公司由禮來公司於 1876 年 5 月 10 日創立，總部位於印第安納州印第安納波利斯。

info.description: PTC, Inc. is a global software company. Its products include Windchill, Creo, ThingWorx, Vuforia, Codebeamer, Arbortext, Arena, and Onshape. The company was founded in 1985 and is headquartered in Boston, MA.
info.description_zh: PTC, Inc. 是一家全球性軟體公司。其產品包括 Windchill、Creo、ThingWorx、Vuforia、Codebeamer、Arbortext、Arena 和 Onshape。該公司成立於 1985 年，總部位於馬薩諸塞州波士頓。

info.description: Ascendis Pharma A/S is a biopharmaceutical company, which engages in the development of drug candidates. It specializes in its TransCon technologies to develop new therapies that address unmet medical needs. The company was founded by Jan Moller Mikkelsen, Dirk Vetter, and Harald Rau on September 21, 2006 and is headquartered in Hellerup, Denmark.
info.description_zh: Ascendis Pharma A/S 是一家生物製藥公司，從事候選藥物的開發。它專注於 TransCon 技術來開發新療法，以滿足未滿足的醫療需求。該公司由 Jan Moller Mikkelsen、Dirk Vetter 和 Harald Rau 於 2006 年 9 月 21 日創立，總部位於丹麥海勒魯普。

info.description: Liberty Media Corp. engages in the media and entertainment industries. It operates through the Formula 1 and Other segments. The Formula 1 segment is involved in the global motorsports business that holds exclusive commercial rights with respect to the world championship, an annual, motor race-based competition. The company was founded on March 28, 1991, and is headquartered in Englewood, CO.
info.description_zh: Liberty Media Corp. 從事媒體和娛樂產業。它透過一級方程式和其他部門運作。一級方程式部門涉足全球賽車運動業務，擁有世界錦標賽的獨家商業權，這是一項年度賽車比賽。該公司成立於1991年3月28日，總部位於科羅拉多州恩格爾伍德。

info.description: LivaNova Plc is a global medical technology company, which engages in the development and delivery of therapeutic solutions for the benefit of patients, healthcare professionals, and healthcare systems. It operates through the following segments: Cardiopulmonary, Neuromodulation, and Advanced Circulatory Support (ACS). The Cardiopulmonary segment is involved in the design, development, manufacture, marketing and selling of cardiopulmonary products. The Neuromodulation segment is associated in the design, development, manufacture, marketing and selling of devices that deliver neuromodulation therapy for treating DRE and DTD. The ACS segment deals with the design, development, manufacture, marketing and selling of temporary life support products. The company was founded in 1987 and is headquartered in London, the United Kingdom.
info.description_zh: LivaNova Plc 是一家全球醫療技術公司，致力於開發和提供治療解決方案，以造福患者、醫療保健專業人員和醫療保健系統。它透過以下部分運作：心肺、神經調節和高級循環支持 (ACS)。心肺部門涉及心肺產品的設計、開發、製造、行銷和銷售。神經調節部門涉及提供神經調節療法以治療 DRE 和 DTD 的設備的設計、開發、製造、行銷和銷售。 ACS 部門從事臨時生命支持產品的設計、開發、製造、行銷和銷售。該公司成立於1987年，總部位於英國倫敦。

info.description: MBX Biosciences, Inc. is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company, which engages in the discovery and development of peptide therapies for the treatment of endocrine and metabolic disorders. Its product candidates and programs include MBX 2109, MBX 1416, and obesity portfolio. The company was founded by Peter Kent Hawryluk and Richard D. DiMarchi in August 2018 and is headquartered in Carmel, IN.
info.description_zh: MBX Biosciences, Inc.是一家臨床階段的生物製藥公司，致力於發現和開發用於治療內分泌和代謝紊亂的勝肽療法。其候選產品和項目包括 MBX 2109、MBX 1416 和肥胖產品組合。該公司由 Peter Kent Hawryluk 和 Richard D. DiMarchi 於 2018 年 8 月創立，總部位於印第安納州卡梅爾。

info.description: NewAmsterdam Pharma Co. NV is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company, which engages in the development of oral, non-statin medicine for patients at high risk of cardiovascular disease with residual elevation of low-density lipoprotein cholesterol. Its lead product candidate, Obicetrapib, is a next-generation, oral, low-dose cholesteryl ester transfer protein inhibitor, which will be used to prevent major adverse cardiovascular events. The company was founded on June 10, 2022 and is headquartered in Naarden, the Netherlands.
info.description_zh: NewAmsterdam Pharma Co. NV 是一家臨床階段的生物製藥公司，致力於為低密度脂蛋白膽固醇殘留升高的心血管疾病高風險患者開發口服非他汀類藥物。其主要候選產品 Obicetrapib 是一種下一代口服、低劑量膽固醇酯轉移蛋白抑制劑，將用於預防主要不良心血管事件。該公司成立於2022年6月10日，總部位於荷蘭納爾登。

info.description: Vox Royalty Corp. operates as a growth and precious metals focused mining royalty and streaming company. It holds a portfolio of 36 royalties and streaming assets and 1 royalty option spanning seven jurisdictions. The company was founded by Kyle Floyd on January 22, 2014 and is headquartered in Ontario, Canada.

info.description_zh: Vox Royal Corp. 是一家專注於成長型和貴金屬的礦業特許權使用費和串流媒體公司。它擁有涵蓋 7 個司法管轄區的 36 種特許權使用費和串流媒體資產以及 1 種特許權使用權的投資組合。該公司由凱爾·弗洛伊德於2014年1月22日創立，總部位於加拿大安大略省。

info.description: Sprouts Farmers Market, Inc. engages in the operation of healthy grocery stores. The firm specializes in fresh, natural and organic products. Its products include fresh produce, bulk foods, vitamins and supplements, grocery, meat and seafood, deli, bakery, dairy, frozen foods, body care and natural household items. The company was founded by Stan Boney, Shon Alexander Boney, and Kevin K. Easler on July 11, 2002 and is headquartered in Phoenix, AZ.
info.description_zh: Sprouts Farmers Market, Inc. 從事健康雜貨店的經營。該公司專注於新鮮、天然和有機產品。其產品包括新鮮農產品、散裝食品、維生素和補充劑、雜貨、肉類和海鮮、熟食店、麵包店、乳製品、冷凍食品、身體護理和天然家居用品。該公司由 Stan Boney、Shon Alexander Boney 和 Kevin K. Easler 於 2002 年 7 月 11 日創立，總部位於亞利桑那州菲尼克斯。

info.description: Novavax, Inc. Is a biotechnology company, which engages in the discovery, development, and commercialization of recombinant vaccines. The company was founded in 1987 and is headquartered in Gaithersburg, MD.
info.description_zh: Novavax, Inc.是一家生技公司，從事重組疫苗的發現、開發和商業化。該公司成立於 1987 年，總部位於馬裡蘭州蓋瑟斯堡。

info.description: Verizon Communications, Inc. is a holding company, which engages in the provision of communications, information, and entertainment products and services. It operates through the Consumer and Business segments. The Consumer segment provides consumer-focused wireless and wire line communications services and products. The Business segment offers wireless and wireline communications services and products, including FWA broadband, data, video and conferencing services, corporate networking solutions, security and managed network services, local and long-distance voice services, and network access to deliver various IoT services and products. The company was founded in 1983 and is headquartered in New York, NY.
info.description_zh: Verizon Communications, Inc. 是一家控股公司，從事提供通訊、資訊和娛樂產品及服務。它透過消費者和商業部門運作。消費者部門提供以消費者為中心的無線和有線通訊服務和產品。該業務部門提供無線和有線通訊服務和產品，包括FWA寬頻、數據、視訊和會議服務、企業網路解決方案、安全和託管網路服務、本地和長途語音服務以及提供各種物聯網服務和產品的網路存取。該公司成立於1983年，總部位於紐約州紐約市。

info.description: American International Group, Inc. is a global insurance organization, which provides property casualty insurance, offering a range of products, including liability, financial lines, property, global specialty, personal lines and accident and health that help businesses, individuals and jurisdictions to protect their assets and manage risks through AIG operations and network partners. It operates through the following segments: North America Commercial, International Commercial and Global Personal. The North America Commercial segment consists of insurance businesses in the United States, Canada and Bermuda. The International Commercial segment refers to insurance businesses in Japan, the United Kingdom, Europe, Middle East and Africa (EMEA region), Asia Pacific, Latin America and Caribbean, and China. The Global Personal segment is involved in insurance businesses in the United States as well as Japan, the United Kingdom, Europe, Middle East and Africa (EMEA region), Asia Pacific, Latin America and Caribbean, and China. The company was founded by Cornelius Vander Starr in 1919 and is headquartered in New York, NY.
info.description_zh: 美國國際集團 (American International Group, Inc.) 是一家提供財產傷亡保險的全球性保險組織，提供一系列產品，包括責任險、金融險、財產險、全球專業險、個人險以及意外和健康險，透過 AIG 營運和網路合作夥伴幫助企業、個人和司法管轄區保護其資產並管理風險。它透過以下部門運作：北美商業部門、國際商業部門和全球個人部門。北美商業部門包括美國、加拿大和百慕達的保險業務。國際商業部門是指日本、英國、歐洲、中東和非洲（EMEA地區）、亞太地區、拉丁美洲和加勒比地區以及中國的保險業務。全球個人部門涉足美國以及日本、英國、歐洲、中東和非洲（EMEA 地區）、亞太地區、拉丁美洲和加勒比地區以及中國的保險業務。該公司由 Cornelius Vander Starr 於 1919 年創立，總部位於紐約州紐約市。

info.description: VSE Corp. is focused on significantly enhancing the productivity and longevity of its customers' high-value, business-critical assets. It operates through the Aviation and Fleet segments. The Aviation segment is a provider of aftermarket parts distribution and MRO services for components and engine accessories supporting commercial, business and general aviation operators. The Fleet segment focuses on the parts distribution, engineering solutions, and mission critical supply chain management services supporting the medium and heavy-duty fleet market. The company was founded in 1959 and is headquartered in Miramar, FL.
info.description_zh: VSE Corp. 致力於大幅提升客戶高價值、業務關鍵型資產的生產力與壽命。它透過航空和機隊部門運作。航空部門是為商業、公務和通用航空業者提供零件和引擎配件的售後零件分銷和 MRO 服務提供者。車隊部門專注於支援中型和重型車隊市場的零件分銷、工程解決方案和關鍵任務供應鏈管理服務。該公司成立於 1959 年，總部位於佛羅裡達州米拉瑪。

info.description: The Trade Desk, Inc. engages in the provision of a self-service and cloud-based ad-buying platform. It operates through the United States and International geographical segments. The firm offers omnichannel advertising, audience targeting, solutions for identity, application programming interface (API), custom, and programmatic, measurement and optimization. The company was founded by Jeffrey Terry Green and David Pickles in November 2009 and is headquartered in Ventura, CA.
info.description_zh: The Trade Desk, Inc. 致力於提供自助服務和基於雲端的廣告購買平台。它透過美國和國際地理部門開展業務。該公司提供全通路廣告、受眾定位、身分解決方案、應用程式介面 (API)、客製化和程式化、測量和優化。該公司由 Jeffrey Terry Green 和 David Pickles 於 2009 年 11 月創立，總部位於加州文圖拉。

info.description: FTAI Aviation Ltd. engages in owning, leasing, and servicing commercial jet engines, with a primary focus on CFM56 and V2500 engines. The firm's portfolio of products, including the Module Factory and a joint venture to manufacture engine PMA components, enables cost savings and flexibility for its airline, lessor, and MRO customer base. It operates through the following segments: Aviation Leasing, Aerospace Products, and Corporate and Other. The Aviation Leasing segment owns and manages aviation assets, including aircraft and engines, which it leases and sells to customers. The Aerospace Products segment develops, manufactures, repairs and refurbishes, and sells aircraft engines and aftermarket components for the CFM56-7B, CFM56-5B, and V2500 engines through its maintenance facilities, equity method investments, and exclusivity arrangements. The company is headquartered in New York, NY.
info.description_zh: FTAI Aviation Ltd. 從事商用噴射引擎的擁有、租賃和維修業務，主要專注於 CFM56 和 V2500 引擎。該公司的產品組合，包括模組工廠和一家製造引擎 PMA 零件的合資企業，為其航空公司、租賃商和 MRO 客戶群實現了成本節約和靈活性。該公司透過以下部門營運：航空租賃部門、航空航太產品部門以及企業及其他部門。航空租賃部門擁有並管理航空資產，包括飛機和發動機，並向客戶租賃和銷售這些資產。航空航太產品部門透過其維修設施、權益法投資和排他性安排，開發、製造、維修和翻新以及銷售 CFM56-7B、CFM56-5B 和 V2500 發動機的飛機發動機和售後零件。該公司總部位於紐約州紐約市。

info.description: O'Reilly Automotive, Inc. owns and operates retail outlets in the United States. It engages in the distribution and retailing of automotive aftermarket parts, tools, supplies, equipment, and accessories in the U.S., serving both professional installers and do-it-yourself customers. It provides new and remanufactured automotive hard parts, including alternators, starters, fuel pumps, water pumps, brake system components, batteries, belts, hoses, temperature controls, chassis parts and engine parts, maintenance items consisting of oil, antifreeze products, fluids, filters, lighting products, engine additives, and appearance products, and accessories, such as floor mats, seat covers, and truck accessories. Its stores offer auto body paint and related materials, automotive tools, and professional service provider service equipment. The firm stores also offer enhanced services and programs consisting of used oil, oil filter and battery recycling, battery, wiper, and bulb replacement, battery diagnostic testing, electrical and module testing, check engine light code extraction, a loaner tool program, drum and rotor resurfacing, custom hydraulic hoses, professional paint shop mixing and related materials, and machine shops. O'Reilly Automotive stores provide do-it-yourself and professional service provider customers a selection of brand name, house brands, and private label products for domestic and imported automobiles, vans, and trucks. The company was founded by Charles F. O'Reilly and Charles H. O'Reilly in November 1957 and is headquartered in Springfield, MO.
info.description_zh: O'Reilly Automotive, Inc. 在美國擁有並經營零售店。该公司在美国从事汽车售后零件、工具、用品、设备和配件的分销和零售，为专业安装人员和自助客户提供服务。它提供全新和再制造的汽车硬零部件，包括交流发电机、起动机、燃油泵、水泵、制动系统组件、电池、皮带、软管、温控器、底盘零件和发动机零件，包括机油、防冻剂产品、液体、过滤器、照明产品、发动机添加剂和外观产品在内的维护项目，以及脚垫、座套和卡车配件等配件。其商店提供車身油漆及相關材料、汽車工具以及專業服務提供者的服務設備。公司商店还提供增强的服务和计划，包括废油、机油滤清器和电池回收、电池、雨刮器和灯泡更换、电池诊断测试、电气和模块测试、检查发动机灯代码提取、借用工具计划、鼓和转子表面重修、定制液压软管、专业喷漆车间混合和相关材料以及机械车间。 O'Reilly Automotive 商店为自助和专业服务提供商客户提供一系列国产和进口汽车、货车和卡车的品牌、自有品牌和自有品牌产品。該公司由 Charles F. O'Reilly 和 Charles H. O'Reilly 於 1957 年 11 月創立，總部位於密蘇裡州斯普林菲爾德。

info.description: Leverage Shares 2X Long CRCL Daily ETF seeks daily levered investment results, before fees and expenses, of two times (200%) of the daily percentage change in the price of the common stock of CRCL. The fund is an actively managed ETF. The fund invests at least 80% of its net assets (plus borrowings for investment purposes) in financial instruments with economic characteristics that, in combination, provide 200% daily leveraged exposure to the price of CRCL, consistent with the fund's investment objective. The fund is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: 槓桿股票 2 倍多頭 CRCL 每日 ETF 尋求每日槓桿投資結果（未計費用和開支）為 CRCL 普通股價格每日百分比變化的兩倍 (200%)。該基金是主動式管理ETF。該基金將至少 80% 的淨資產（加上用於投資目的的借款）投資於具有經濟特徵的金融工具，這些金融工具綜合起來為 CRCL 的價格提供 200% 的每日槓桿敞口，這與基金的投資目標一致。該基金是非多元化的。

info.description: Aeva Technologies, Inc. develops sensing paradigm for autonomous vehicles and robotics. The firm offers drones, robotics, vehicle technology, and virtual and augmented reality products. The company was founded by Soroush Salehian Dardashti and Mina Rezk in 2017 and is headquartered in Mountain View, CA.
info.description_zh: Aeva Technologies, Inc. 為自動駕駛車輛和機器人開發感測範例。該公司提供無人機、機器人、車輛技術以及虛擬和擴增實境產品。該公司由 Soroush Salehian Dardashti 和 Mina Rezk 於 2017 年創立，總部位於加州山景城。

info.description: Defiance Daily Target 2X Long RGTI ETF seeks daily investment results, before fees and expenses, of two times (200%) the daily percentage change in the share price of Rigetti Computing, Inc. The fund is an actively managed exchange traded fund ("ETF") that attempts to achieve two times (200%) the daily percentage change in the share price of the underlying security by employing derivatives, namely swap agreements and/or listed options contracts. The fund is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: Defiance Daily Target 2X Long RGTI ETF 尋求在費用和開支之前達到 Rigetti Computer, Inc. 股價每日百分比變化兩倍 (200%) 的每日投資結果。該基金是一檔主動管理的交易所交易基金 (“ETF”)，試圖透過使用衍生性商品，即掉期協議和/或上市選擇權合約，實現標的證券股價每日百分比變化兩倍 (200%) 的結果。該基金是非多元化的。
